![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_9000,w_1200,f_auto,q_auto/1751300/898887_138008.jpeg) 
- **The Theory of 3 Zones**- **WHAT IS THE 3 ZONES THEORY?**- The usefulness in distinguishing 3 Zones is that each of them requires a different path to continue walking in the Learning Spiral. - “The Red Zone” is when the person is highly in survival, there is very little space in them to be Here and Now, Present (https://becomepresent.mystrikingly.com/) in their Adult Ego State (https://egostate.mystrikingly.com/). It is often very noticeable when someone is in the Red Zone, their survival strategies are at play and one or more of their 5 bodies is likely unbalanced as a result. - When you or whoever you are relating with is in the Red Zone, the way to navigate out of it and into “The Green Zone” is through vacuum, creating Inner space in order to become more Present in the 5 bodies. WARNING: Inner space does not mean running away from the discomfort, Inner space might mean Practicing a Basic Inner Navigation Skill such as a listening space (https://listenings.mystrikingly.com/), a 5 body check in (https://5bodies.mystrikingly.com/), letting your Heart Speak (https://heartgym.mystrikingly.com/), Centering Grounding and Bubbling (https://firstposition.mystrikingly.com/) or perhaps Completing an Incomplete Communication. (https://completeincompleteemotions.mystrikingly.com/) (https://completeincompleteemotions.mystrikingly.com/)Some people spend their lives unconsciously on the Red Zone. - “The Green Zone” is when the person is feeling their feelings, meaning, in High Drama, experimenting at the edge of their Conscious Incompetences, receiving feedback from the Universe, shifting and GOing again with a new experiment, Discovering and on the Path of Evolution. - “The Grey Zone” is when the person seems “bored”, they are unconsciously incompetent in sourcing what they want to create, they might not even have clarity what it is they want to create. It is similar to the Red Zone in that the person is not at the edge of Aliveness and Discovery in the learning spiral but in Low Drama and not in Reality in one or more of their 5 bodies. - When you or whoever you are relating with is in the Grey Zone, they have likely spiraled into Unconscious Competence in a skill that had taken considerable energy and attention, leaving sudden space for them to discover a new dimension of practice they do not yet know that they are hungry for. What they need in plain lenguage might be a kick in the butt, energy and information from the Universe (a.k.a feedback) about a part of themselves that they don’t know that they don’t know about, that could potentially unfold, which would require starting over in Conscious Incompetence in the Learning Spiral. - I am extracting this from my last newsletter, to read the whole thing: - [https://mailchi.mp/fcf2bba53307/the-villaging-bridgehouse](https://mailchi.mp/fcf2bba53307/the-villaging-bridgehouse)- **THE GREY ZONE**- From - [Vera Luísa Franco](https://www.verafranco.org/)- It seems that the grey zone is the zone that most people in the world operate. This might not have anything to do with unconscious competence of a particular skill from say, a musician, or a dancer, unless you might be talking about unconscious competence of the Box. - I love that many people are talking about 3 zones, I guess because it seems to be needed. And I think I have heard of at least 4 different maps of the 3 zones, all with different distinctions. - One map has green, yellow, and red where the yellow is the learning zone, the green is the comfort one (similar to your Grey zone), and the red zone is the danger zone, where people do not learn. - Another map is the red zone is beyond reactivity, where people are not able to be present in any way, they cannot learn or listen, and cannot grow matrix, the green zone is at the edge of the Box and then there is a pink zone which the person is not in their body. - (EDITOR'S NOTE: The 'pink zone' is represented by the 'pink cloud' in the 3 Zones website logo...) - I don’t remember the fourth map right now. - **THE 'PINK' ZONE**- From Gabriel Hudrey - I heard something about the pink zone: people not aware of their danger zone (red zone), pretending that all is ok or else thinking they are ok because they have the habit of living in the red zone so much that they're not aware that it's survival. - I heard about the pink zone in Radical Collaboration and the image is a water melon green on the outside (so does the pretending) pink in the inside. - I love the Calrity of your Maps! @AnaMariaDiazTirado ! - **THE RED ZONE AND INTIMACY**- From Sarah Von Helden - I experienced this distinction of the zones in the - [Women Of Earth](http://womenofearth.live)Lab last week. I was totally numb and the words from @VeraLuisaFranco and Anne-Chloé could enter my mental body but then there was a gap to get what it means what they say. So I started with the latest programm I had which was 'I feel fear' but I didn't feel anything. I was waiting for an order that my brain could get, something known. I got that I tried to produce the experience of sadness as a survival strategy because this helped my body to relax and release when I was a child. For this I also need a known story. To experience the same again so I am safe.- My energetic body was gone a day before in an other process, but I didn't get it. I was stuck with, that I would need connection but in a way I could not tell. I asked a woman to be on my side. Later she went away and didn't come back. I didn't reach out to someone else and went into my robot mode. I get that I was putting my self together, to go on with the training like a robot, instead of being in contact with somebody about how crushed I was really inside. I could only function. - Thank you for the map with this distinctions. - I get that I am since months in the red zone and that I really need deep connection and intimacy If I want to create something. A step by step going with what comes up in the processes of creation. It's about let the Being unfold in the doing, not doing things and when they are done then there is a space where I can unfold. - I need more time to create then I was aware. Actually I research about to unfold my Being in joy when I open a - [door](http://doorway.mystrikingly.com)for spaceholding. To invite my son, my friends, my relatives into a space. I need much less spaces for connection because, I deepen the relating where I am actually.- That also relaxes my nervous system. It's creating in creation. Thank you @SandraMathes for your spaceholding and bridging me back into my body, being the Love, Clearety and Integrity I needed to land again and again. - Love, - Sarah - **3 ZONES WITH CLIENTS**- From - [Christine Dürschner](http://christineduerschner.net/)- The following map I use is for Scanning and categorizing the capacity, the availability to work with clients and what is needed from my approach. - It defferentiates from the perspective, which I love by the way, what Ana María was bringing, which gathered the behaviors and actions and the resources which are used or not used from the client. The map colors are: green, organge, and red - Green - people are available to receive and are open to jump into the pool of transformation. - They are present, centered and grounded. Their nervous system is relaxed to the degree that they have choice to do the work, to be open to practise skills and expanding the capacity of emodying the natural ressources available as feelings, energetic tools. Building matrix is possible. - Clarity, Healing, Transformation, Empowerment, Possibilities is possible. - Organge - People are in the midst of a liquid state. They are riding the emotional rolercoaster or a griefprocess is happening, where the move through all the feelings in a disordered way. Groundedlessness and not knowing is present. More input is not possible and also not useful. - Integration, Healing, Acceptance, Caring is necessary - Red - The nervous system is full on in flight, fight or freeze mode. The focus is to regulate the body to a degree that it is possible to built inner resources with baby steps while regulating a gentle learning how to get out of fight, flight or freeze is happening. - Presence, Tenderness, Slowness, Possibilities is needed - Love, Christine

Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code 3ZONESxx.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!

- ## A Loose Affiliation (of) Millionaires And Billionaires
- **Investments and Projects with a new purpose:**- **Transformation**- **BEING HONEST WITH YOURSELF**- Dedicating your life to making more money can quickly become boring and pointless. - Admitting diminished satisfaction from adding zeroes to your account grants you entry to a new path. - ALAMAB stands for ' - *A Loose Affiliation (of) Millionaires And Billionaires*', lyrics from the Paul Simon song '- [The Boy In The Bubble](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ToKsXHRh7Yo)'.- Your new affiliations emerge from a shared, magically healing purpose: inventing - [gameworlds](https://gameworldtheory.mystrikingly.com)that improve the well-being of Earth and her ecosystems.- What does this mean? - It means changing your money back into real value. - This is Transformational Investing: investing for the purpose of causing regenerative human cultures on Earth, creating a future in which you can be authentically proud. - Effective global teamwork is already underway, mostly below the radar. - What do you Stand for? - When will you - [Take A Stand](http://takeastand.mystrikingly.com)for what you Stand for?- **WE USE TWO PRIMARY STRATEGIES**- 1. Amplifying projects already in existence and doing transformational culture-building work. - 2. Organizing teams that originate new transformational projects. - Both strategies are effective. - Both strategies are required. 
- **Collaborative Invention**- **FROM COMPETING TO COLLABORATING**- Since the core strategy of the capitalist patriarchal empire is competition, imagining that others engaged in Transformational Investing might not be your competitors, but rather your allies, can be a significant shift of paradigm. - A shift of paradigm includes a shift of - [Worldview](https://boxtechnology.mystrikingly.com), a shift of self-image, a shift of- [Survival Strategy](https://survivalstrategy.mystrikingly.com), and a shift of Context. When any of these solid foundations upon which you stand change shape, the ground beneath your feet may seem to fall out from under you. Soon enough, new ground will form upon which to stand and interact with the world, but the interim discomfort is called a- [Liquid State](https://liquidstate.mystrikingly.com), and it can involve all of your- [5 Bodies](https://5bodies.mystrikingly.com)(Physical Body, Intellectual Body, Emotional Body, Energetic Body, Archetypal Body).- The shift can, however, occur. There are three forces aiding you in this shift: - 1. EXTERNAL NECESSITY. - 3. INTERNAL NECESSITY: - 2. THE FORCE OF THE EVOLUTION OF CONSCIOUSNESS ON THE PATH: - We encourage you to let these forces do their work through you to serve the evolution and expansion of awareness in human beings. You might be surprised how powerful they actually are for catalyzing real results, and how generous they are with supporting your soul to come out and play in ways that make a positive difference in the world. - Welcome to Transformational Investing. 
- **Alchemical Gameplan**- **It turns out that bringing the following 5 Resources together into one**- **configuration**- **has the transformational power to invent ecstatic new culture that never existed on Earth before.**- **You are now encountering the**- **Possibility**- **of calling forth**- **this**- **Domain**- **of**- **Creation**- **.**- **The question is, what are you going to do about it?**![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_9000,w_1200,f_auto,q_1/1751300/697735_593282.jpeg) - Individuals and small groups are moving their - [Point of Origin](http://pointoforigin.mystrikingly.com)into- [Radical Responsibility](http://radicalresponsibility.mystrikingly.com)for effectively- [Stewarding](http://stewardship.mystrikingly.com)100 Million Dollars. They have already developed a- [Gameplan](http://gameplan.mystrikingly.com)for what to do with it. This way the- [Earth Coincidence Control Office](http://ecco.mystrikingly.com)(E.C.C.O.) has an interesting reason to give it to them.![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_9000,w_1200,f_auto,q_1/1751300/299201_908306.jpeg) - [Archan Law](http://archanlaw.mystrikingly.com)comes to life through- [Possibilitators](http://possibilitator.mystrikingly.com)building out- [Archan](http://archan.mystrikingly.com)infrastructure by combining Radical Responsibility, Universal Jurisdiction, Citizen's Arrest, and Bounty Hunting. The 'boys' will be boys held accountable. Impunity does not exist in a responsible Universe.- [Irresponsibility is an illusion](http://radicalresponsibility.mystrikingly.com).![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_9000,w_1200,f_auto,q_1/1751300/362981_650746.jpeg) - [Possibilitator Training](http://possibilitatortraining.mystrikingly.com)supports- [Edgeworkers](http://edgeworker.mystrikingly.com)in small- [Teams](http://yourteams.mystrikingly.com)around the world to develop absurdly effective- [transformational skill levels](http://possibilitatorskills.mystrikingly.com)in- [Nonmaterial](http://nonmaterialvalue.mystrikingly.com)Archan- [professions](https://possibilitatortraining.mystrikingly.com/#specialties)that modern culture has never even heard of. Just because you never learned it before does not mean you cannot learn it now.![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_9000,w_1200,f_auto,q_1/1751300/362917_623368.jpeg) - What is a Team that unleasehes - [potentials](http://potentials.mystrikingly.com),- [knacks](http://knacks.mystrikingly.com),- [ecstasy](http://highlevelfun.mystrikingly.com), and- [goup intelligence](http://torustechnology.mystrikingly.com)for the purpose of- [awareness expansion](http://path.mystrikingly.com)rather than the purpose of seeking material gain on a planet of limited material resources? That Team is a- [Growness](http://growness.mystrikingly.com). Growness replaces Business in Archiarchy. Ordinary resource limitations of the material world no longer apply when you jack-into- [Infinite Resources](http://infiniteresources.mystrikingly.com).![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_9000,w_1200,f_auto,q_1/1751300/605475_904396.jpeg) - When the stakes are high and the answers are few, the - [conscious](http://consciousness.mystrikingly.com)- [Nonlinear](http://gononlinear.mystrikingly.com)and- [Unreasonable](http://gounreasonable.mystrikingly.com)resources of your- [Gremlin](http://gremlin.mystrikingly.com)provide massive leverage. But your Gremlin is only- [trained](http://boxtechnology.mystrikingly.com)to- [compete to win](http://mapofpossibility.mystrikingly.com)against other Gremlins. How can you- [initiate](http://initiations.mystrikingly.com)your Gremlin into- [Radically Responsible](http://radicalresponsibility.mystrikingly.com)co-creation? Through- [Gremlin Transformation School](http://gremlintransformation.mystrikingly.com). Suddenly you have creative allies rather than sneaky competitors.

- **Archan Infrastructure Principles**- The joy here comes from organizing yourself into a Team with others Edgeworkers who are in a similar Phase of the adventure as you are. - There is already a global community of Archan villages with: - 3Cells
- Possibility Teams
- S.P.A.R.K. Experiment spaces
- Book Study Groups
- Bridgehouses
- Archiarchy Invention Centers
- Nanonations
- and so on.
 - Each Team waits for you to come and introduce yourself and jump on board! 
- **Archan Infrastructure In Reality**![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_9000,w_1200,f_auto,q_1/1751300/809715_12970.jpeg) - Ontree Archiarchy Invention Centre - Ontree Archiarchy Invention Centre: - [ontreecentre.org](http://ontreecentre.org)- At Ontree, we are the guardians of the land pioneering a cultural shift towards Archiarchy, a new way of relating to each other and the world around us. - Through collaborative research and experimentation, we are fostering a rapid learning environment where Archetypal Love guides our actions and interactions, creating possibilities for transformation and thriving. ![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_9000,w_1200,f_auto,q_1/1751300/961405_664034.jpeg) - Archiarchy River - Archiarchy River: - [archiarchyriver.mystrikingly.com](https://archiarchyriver.mystrikingly.com/)- Archiarchy River (the “River”) serves to facilitate the flow of members’ savings to projects that directly or indirectly contribute to creating Next Culture, Archiarchy. The result is that instead of savings being stored as potential energy in ‘dams’ or used by banks, they constantly flow regeneratively as a river through Next Culture projects. - In addition, the River serves as a bridge from Modern Culture economy thoughtware to Archiarchal economy thoughtware. The main forum for this inner transformation are the fortnightly meetings where non-material values are exchanged such as Feedback, Coaching, Gameworld Consulting, Distinctions, Dangerous Questions, and Emotional Healing Processes are offered and requested. ![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_9000,w_1200,f_auto,q_1/1751300/142285_497802.png) - Chuckleberry Community Farm - Chuckleberry Community Farm: - [chuckleberrycommunity.ca](https://www.chuckleberrycommunity.ca/)- Chuckleberry is a community of inspired, clear-minded individuals creating a relational-centred, regenerative lifestyle that naturally catalyzes the evolution of human consciousness. We are enabling the old paradigm to fade away without fighting; we are allowing a practical yet magical nature to guide our way. - People come to Chuckleberry not just to learn about sustainability and organic food production. Coming to Chuckleberry is an invitation to relax into all of what you are and all of what you feel. In-house workshops and trainings are available to support you on your journey. ![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_9000,w_1200,f_auto,q_1/1751300/360968_578906.jpeg) - Archiarchy Kiva - Archiarchy Kiva: - [archiarchykiva.mystrikingly.com](http://archiarchykiva.mystrikingly.com)- Join the Archiarchy Kiva Team: - [kiva.org/invitedto/archiarchy_kiva/by/annechlo2830](https://www.kiva.org/invitedto/archiarchy_kiva/by/annechlo2830)- Kiva.org is a personal online savings account where you can change someone's life by giving them a no-interest loan of as little as $25. - 'Archiarchy Kiva' is the customized Kiva Lending Team that is Contexted in next culture - Archiarchy - the culture that is naturally emerging now that Matriarchy and Patriarchy have run their course. ![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_9000,w_1200,f_auto,q_1/1751300/826879_332665.jpeg) - Archiarchy Artabana - Archiarchy Artabana: - [archiarchyartabana.mystrikingly.com](http://archiarchyartabana.mystrikingly.com)- Artabana is a global network of small self-governing health-support groups. We meet regularly as local health clubs with 5-20 members of all ages, creating trust, and sharing clarity, possibility, and love, to maximize our physical, mental, emotional, energetic and archetypal health. We benevolently pool finances for medical emergencies. - Each Artabana Circle is unique. The uniqueness of Archiarchy Artabana is defined as a specific Context. A Context is the set of Distinctions, Thoughtmaps, Tools, Thoughtware, and Processes out of which a Gameworld emerges. - Archiarchy Artabana is a collaborative, Winning-Happening, Gaian Gameworld for Healing and Transformation – part of the global Artabana Gameworld. Our aim is to support each Archiarchy Artabana member on their Path of preparing to jack-in to their - [Archetypal Lineage](http://archetypallineage.mystrikingly.com), and then to deliver their services to the village.![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_9000,w_1200,f_auto,q_1/1751300/511496_914935.jpeg) - Archiarchy Invention Centers (AIC) - Archiarchy Invention Centers: - [archiarchyinventioncenters.mystrikingly.com](http://archiarchyinventioncenters.mystrikingly.com)- If you attend a university and receive a B.S., M.S., or even Ph.D. degree, what have you done? You have learned to duplicate what is already proven to exterminate life on Earth 100 times faster than when the Chicxulub asteroid crashed into the Yucutan sixty-six-million years ago. - The fundamental difference between AICs and universities is that AICs don't teach you anything. Instead, they require that you invent a new path for human culture on Earth. It is not about fitting in to an already existing culture, but rather to build out and inhabit a not yet existing culture, a culture that is regenerative. - [Regenerative culture](http://regenerateearthgoals.mystrikingly.com)is very different from a green consumption, recycling conscious, sustainable development, electric car culture which aims to optimize shareholder value.- Regenerative culture is Earth centric, not profit centric. - Archiarchy Invention Centers are a 'soft landing' platform for when your worldview crashes against reality and you are ready to take - [Radical Responsibility](http://radicalresponsibility.mystrikingly.com)for using human potentials and group intelligence to invent a regenerative society based on nonmaterial economics. You will be upagrading your- [thoughtware](http://50thoughtwareupgrades.mystrikingly.com).- Your first new skillset will be learning to - [Cavitate](http://cavitatespace.mystrikingly.com)and- [Spacehold](http://holdspace.mystrikingly.com)the invention of new Archiarchy Invention Centers.![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_9000,w_1200,f_auto,q_1/1751300/202986_239590.jpeg) - Possibility Management Healing Village - The global - [Possibility Mangement Healing Village](http://pmhealingvillage.mystrikingly.com)is nearly 1000 members around the world providing and exchanging advanced- [5 Body](http://5bodies.mystrikingly.com)healing- [processes](http://process.mystrikingly.com)with each other. It is not a club, not a co-op, not a business, yet so much- [Nonmaterial Value](http://nonmaterialvalue.mystrikingly.com)is exchanged on a daily basis that it boggles the mind to conceive of. More Value is exchanged than money could pay for. Money is a pitiful and nearly worthless Value in comparison with the Value of- [clarity](http://swordofclarity.mystrikingly.com),- [possibility](http://createpossibility.mystrikingly.com),- [transformation](http://causetransformation.mystrikingly.com),- [3 Phase Healing](http://3phasehealing.mystrikingly.com),- [connection](http://torustechnology.mystrikingly.com),- [relatedness](http://radicalrelating.mystrikingly.com),- [intimacy](http://intimacy.mystrikingly.com), evolution, and- [Love](http://archetypallove.mystrikingly.com)that is being effectively, ongoingly, and collaboratively co-created in the PM Healing Village.
- **Archan Infrastructure Experiments**![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_1440,w_720,f_auto,q_1/1751300/191314_295355.jpeg) - **DESIGN A HUMAN PHILOSOPHICAL INTERACTION IN THE CONTEXT OF ARCHIARCHY**- Matrix Code - **ARCHINFR.01**- An Archan Economic system only thrives within the cultural context of Next Cultures, - [Archiarchy](http://archiarchy.mystrikingly.com). Archan Economics and Modern Culture Patriarchy are exclusive of each other, just as water and oil are immiscible.- STEP 1: In your Possibility Team, from whichever context you stand in right now, define together what Archan Economics is. Important: ask for a Documenter to write down everything that is being said in the Process. - STEP 2: Together, follow the instructions on the antonym website to - [Cavitate Space](http://cavitatespace.mystrikingly.com)in which your defined Archan Economic system thrives.- STEP 3: Ask for two volunteer. Their job is to play out a human Economic interation that fits into your Archan Economics design for 4-5 minutes (or longer). Have someone write down as fast as they can the interaction and add it to the write-up of the Design. - Call the next two people to design the next human Economic interaction. STEP 3 uses - [Improvisation](https://improvise.mystrikingly.com/)as defined by Keith Johnstone in his book- *Impro: Improvisation and the Theatre:*"Good improvisers accept all offers made—which is something no ‘normal’ person would do."- STEP 4: Ask for another 1 volunteer. Standing in the circle, ask them tell you the - [Story](https://storyworld.mystrikingly.com/)of a town in which this Archan Economic system thrive. How does it go? How does the town physically look like? What do people talk about around a cup of coffee? What are the main- [offers](https://5offers.mystrikingly.com/)of the town? What do the advertisements say about the town? Why do people come and stay in the town? Anybody can ask any question to the speaker.- Clap for the volunteers after each demonstration. - Publish your Archan Economics Design and the transcript of the Human Interaction in an - [article](https://writeyourarticle.mystrikingly.com/).- After publishing your Archan Economics Design, please register Matrix Code ARCHECON.01 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 5 Matrix Points. ![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_1440,w_720,f_auto,q_1/1751300/311407_912689.jpeg) - **GO THROUGH 50 THOUGHTWARE UPGRADE IN 52 WEEKS WITH YOUR 'ARCHAN ECONOMICS' POSSIBILITY TEAM.**- Matrix Code - **ARCHECON.02**- Create an 'Archan Economics' Possibility Team for the fixed period of 52 weeks (one year). You meet once a week. For example, Thursday evening at 7.30pm for one hour and a half. - Together, read the - [50 Thoughtware Upgrades](https://50thoughtwareupgrades.mystrikingly.com/)website.- Each week, you choose one Thoughtware that you want to Upgrade in yourself. - Frame up the Thoughtware Upgrade in regards to shifting your current Economy culture to Archan Economics. - For example, Thoughtware Upgrade - **#1 is WHERE YOUR ATTENTION GOES, YOUR ENERGY FLOWS.**Inquire seriously about what your Attention is mostly devoured by such as Advertisements, Unconscious Fears,- [Worries](http://numbnessbar.mystrikingly.com),- [Resentment](https://resentment.mystrikingly.com/), Competition, Comparison, ...- Where your Attention is eaten by is what makes up your Economy system. You deal in Resentment and - [Revenge](https://revenge.mystrikingly.com/), you trade competive actions and being-better-than, you shop for the next- [Authority Figures](https://thehierarchy.mystrikingly.com/)to Give your- [Center](https://becomecentered.mystrikingly.com/)Away to and blame, ...- Beware! You cannot shift your Attention to something else until you have solidly identify how you first relinquish it to unconscious forces. - The experiment for the week is: - [Choose](https://choosing.mystrikingly.com/)one new element of your Economy on which you want to Consciously place your Attention on. For example, your Quality of- [Being](http://yourbeing.mystrikingly.com), or how and when you- [Cavitate Space](https://cavitatespace.mystrikingly.com/)for your own- [Culture](https://yourculture.mystrikingly.com/).- Go through each of the 50 Thgouthware Upgrades. At the end of the year, Celebrate by writing an Article on your self-design Archan Economics in your - [Gaian Gameworld](https://gaiangameworlds.mystrikingly.com/).- After publishing your Archan Economics - [article](https://writeyourarticle.mystrikingly.com/), please register Matrix Code ARCHECON.02 in your free account at- [StartOver.xyz]. This Experiment is worth 55 Matrix Points.![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_1440,w_720,f_auto,q_1/1751300/375132_327057.jpeg) - **GENERATE 100€ IN 1 HOUR WITH NO PLANNING AHEAD**- Matrix Code - **ARCHECON.03**- Money is everywhere. There is enough money in the world for what you need. - It is - *you*who have not- [become the thing](http://becomemoney.mystrikingly.com)to allow- [Resources](http://infiniteresources.mystrikingly.com)(including monetary finances) to flow through you.- The following experiment is ideally done in a Possibility Team. Instead of meeting in someone's living room, meet in the center of your town. - Archan Infrastructure Principles - The joy here comes from organizing yourself into a Team with others Edgeworkers who are in a similar Phase of the adventure as you are. - There is already a global community of Archan villages with: - 3Cells
- Possibility Teams
- S.P.A.R.K. Experiment spaces
- Book Study Groups
- Bridgehouses
- Archiarchy Invention Centers
- Nanonations
- and so on.
 - Each Team waits for you to come and introduce yourself and jump on board! 
- Archan Infrastructure In Reality - Ontree Archiarchy Invention Centre - Ontree Archiarchy Invention Centre: ontreecentre.org - At Ontree, we are the guardians of the land pioneering a cultural shift towards Archiarchy, a new way of relating to each other and the world around us. - Through collaborative research and experimentation, we are fostering a rapid learning environment where Archetypal Love guides our actions and interactions, creating possibilities for transformation and thriving. - Archiarchy River - Archiarchy River: archiarchyriver.mystrikingly.com - Archiarchy River (the “River”) serves to facilitate the flow of members’ savings to projects that directly or indirectly contribute to creating Next Culture, Archiarchy. The result is that instead of savings being stored as potential energy in ‘dams’ or used by banks, they constantly flow regeneratively as a river through Next Culture projects. - In addition, the River serves as a bridge from Modern Culture economy thoughtware to Archiarchal economy thoughtware. The main forum for this inner transformation are the fortnightly meetings where non-material values are exchanged such as Feedback, Coaching, Gameworld Consulting, Distinctions, Dangerous Questions, and Emotional Healing Processes are offered and requested. - Chuckleberry Community Farm - Chuckleberry Community Farm: chuckleberrycommunity.ca - Chuckleberry is a community of inspired, clear-minded individuals creating a relational-centred, regenerative lifestyle that naturally catalyzes the evolution of human consciousness. We are enabling the old paradigm to fade away without fighting; we are allowing a practical yet magical nature to guide our way. - People come to Chuckleberry not just to learn about sustainability and organic food production. Coming to Chuckleberry is an invitation to relax into all of what you are and all of what you feel. In-house workshops and trainings are available to support you on your journey. - Archiarchy Kiva - Archiarchy Kiva: archiarchykiva.mystrikingly.com - Join the Archiarchy Kiva Team: kiva.org/invitedto/archiarchy_kiva/by/annechlo2830 - Kiva.org is a personal online savings account where you can change someone's life by giving them a no-interest loan of as little as $25. - 'Archiarchy Kiva' is the customized Kiva Lending Team that is Contexted in next culture - Archiarchy - the culture that is naturally emerging now that Matriarchy and Patriarchy have run their course. - Archiarchy Artabana - Archiarchy Artabana: archiarchyartabana.mystrikingly.com - Artabana is a global network of small self-governing health-support groups. We meet regularly as local health clubs with 5-20 members of all ages, creating trust, and sharing clarity, possibility, and love, to maximize our physical, mental, emotional, energetic and archetypal health. We benevolently pool finances for medical emergencies. - Each Artabana Circle is unique. The uniqueness of Archiarchy Artabana is defined as a specific Context. A Context is the set of Distinctions, Thoughtmaps, Tools, Thoughtware, and Processes out of which a Gameworld emerges. - Archiarchy Artabana is a collaborative, Winning-Happening, Gaian Gameworld for Healing and Transformation – part of the global Artabana Gameworld. Our aim is to support each Archiarchy Artabana member on their Path of preparing to jack-in to their Archetypal Lineage, and then to deliver their services to the village. - Archiarchy Invention Centers (AIC) - Archiarchy Invention Centers: archiarchyinventioncenters.mystrikingly.com - If you attend a university and receive a B.S., M.S., or even Ph.D. degree, what have you done? You have learned to duplicate what is already proven to exterminate life on Earth 100 times faster than when the Chicxulub asteroid crashed into the Yucutan sixty-six-million years ago. - The fundamental difference between AICs and universities is that AICs don't teach you anything. Instead, they require that you invent a new path for human culture on Earth. It is not about fitting in to an already existing culture, but rather to build out and inhabit a not yet existing culture, a culture that is regenerative. - Regenerative culture is very different from a green consumption, recycling conscious, sustainable development, electric car culture which aims to optimize shareholder value. - Regenerative culture is Earth centric, not profit centric. - Archiarchy Invention Centers are a 'soft landing' platform for when your worldview crashes against reality and you are ready to take Radical Responsibility for using human potentials and group intelligence to invent a regenerative society based on nonmaterial economics. You will be upagrading your thoughtware. - Your first new skillset will be learning to Cavitate and Spacehold the invention of new Archiarchy Invention Centers. - Possibility Management Healing Village - The global Possibility Mangement Healing Village is nearly 1000 members around the world providing and exchanging advanced 5 Body healing processes with each other. It is not a club, not a co-op, not a business, yet so much Nonmaterial Value is exchanged on a daily basis that it boggles the mind to conceive of. More Value is exchanged than money could pay for. Money is a pitiful and nearly worthless Value in comparison with the Value of clarity, possibility, transformation, 3 Phase Healing, connection, relatedness, intimacy, evolution, and Love that is being effectively, ongoingly, and collaboratively co-created in the PM Healing Village. 
- Archan Infrastructure Experiments - DESIGN A HUMAN PHILOSOPHICAL INTERACTION IN THE CONTEXT OF ARCHIARCHY - Matrix Code ARCHINFR.01 - An Archan Economic system only thrives within the cultural context of Next Cultures, Archiarchy. Archan Economics and Modern Culture Patriarchy are exclusive of each other, just as water and oil are immiscible. - STEP 1: In your Possibility Team, from whichever context you stand in right now, define together what Archan Economics is. Important: ask for a Documenter to write down everything that is being said in the Process. - STEP 2: Together, follow the instructions on the antonym website to Cavitate Space in which your defined Archan Economic system thrives. - STEP 3: Ask for two volunteer. Their job is to play out a human Economic interation that fits into your Archan Economics design for 4-5 minutes (or longer). Have someone write down as fast as they can the interaction and add it to the write-up of the Design. - Call the next two people to design the next human Economic interaction. STEP 3 uses Improvisation as defined by Keith Johnstone in his book Impro: Improvisation and the Theatre: "Good improvisers accept all offers made—which is something no ‘normal’ person would do." - STEP 4: Ask for another 1 volunteer. Standing in the circle, ask them tell you the Story of a town in which this Archan Economic system thrive. How does it go? How does the town physically look like? What do people talk about around a cup of coffee? What are the main offers of the town? What do the advertisements say about the town? Why do people come and stay in the town? Anybody can ask any question to the speaker. - Clap for the volunteers after each demonstration. - Publish your Archan Economics Design and the transcript of the Human Interaction in an article. - After publishing your Archan Economics Design, please register Matrix Code ARCHECON.01 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 5 Matrix Points. - GO THROUGH 50 THOUGHTWARE UPGRADE IN 52 WEEKS WITH YOUR 'ARCHAN ECONOMICS' POSSIBILITY TEAM. - Matrix Code ARCHECON.02 - Create an 'Archan Economics' Possibility Team for the fixed period of 52 weeks (one year). You meet once a week. For example, Thursday evening at 7.30pm for one hour and a half. - Together, read the 50 Thoughtware Upgrades website. - Each week, you choose one Thoughtware that you want to Upgrade in yourself. - Frame up the Thoughtware Upgrade in regards to shifting your current Economy culture to Archan Economics. - For example, Thoughtware Upgrade #1 is WHERE YOUR ATTENTION GOES, YOUR ENERGY FLOWS. Inquire seriously about what your Attention is mostly devoured by such as Advertisements, Unconscious Fears, Worries, Resentment, Competition, Comparison, ... - Where your Attention is eaten by is what makes up your Economy system. You deal in Resentment and Revenge, you trade competive actions and being-better-than, you shop for the next Authority Figures to Give your Center Away to and blame, ... - Beware! You cannot shift your Attention to something else until you have solidly identify how you first relinquish it to unconscious forces. - The experiment for the week is: Choose one new element of your Economy on which you want to Consciously place your Attention on. For example, your Quality of Being, or how and when you Cavitate Space for your own Culture. - Go through each of the 50 Thgouthware Upgrades. At the end of the year, Celebrate by writing an Article on your self-design Archan Economics in your Gaian Gameworld. - After publishing your Archan Economics article, please register Matrix Code ARCHECON.02 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 55 Matrix Points. - GENERATE 100€ IN 1 HOUR WITH NO PLANNING AHEAD - Matrix Code ARCHECON.03 - Money is everywhere. There is enough money in the world for what you need. - It is you who have not become the thing to allow Resources (including monetary finances) to flow through you. - The following experiment is ideally done in a Possibility Team. Instead of meeting in someone's living room, meet in the center of your town. Gather in a Circle, Center yourself, Ground yourself, Bubble yourself, Cavitate Space in which 'I am money', and go your own way. You have one hour to generate 100€. - I think of three real Possibilities right now: Give a speech about the potential of asking for 100€; call up friends and have them wire you money until you reach 100€; invent a completely new begging routine that includes compliments, possibilities, dangerous questions. - If you cannot think of 3 real Possibilities in the next 1 minute, ask for an Emotional Healing Process to remove the block to being a magnet for money. - After exactly 1 hour, meet back in a Circle, check how much money people have generate in one hour. Sit and share what you learn, what worked and what did not. Decide together where to flow this treasure. - After flowing the money in the chosen hands, please register Matrix Code ARCHECON.03 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 9 Matrix Points. - Matrix Code ARCHECON.04 - Nonmaterial Value. This means the center of town is a car-less, street-free, intimate gathering space for families, couples, and group celebrations. Nature is abundant with edible forests, pathways with bridges over brooks, and ponds all teeming with wildlife. Paths to this center are lined with Possibility Cafés, Rage Clubs, Fear Clubs, 3 Phase Healing Offices, Possibility Cinemas, Women's Circles, Men's Circles, Children's Culture Spaces, Possibility Coaching Offices, Initiation Centers, Emotional Healing Process (EHP) Dojos, Memetic Engineering Centers, Possibility Mediation Offices, Circus Skills Houses, Intimacy Cafés, Training Centers, WorkTalk Domes, Study Groups, Gremlin Transformation Rooms, Ego State Decontamination Offices, and Thoughtware Upgrade Shops. - DESIGN AND IMPLEMENT THE FIRST ACTION TO CREATE A VILLAGE CENTER BASED ON ARCHAN ECONOMICS- Matrix Code ARCHECON.25 - The experiment is to completely designed from start to finish a model of a Village's Main Street based on Archan Economics. - This extends to drawing on a A5 the streets (or lack of), the green space, the markets, and obviously the Nonmaterial Value stores. - Write along side a proposal for how to shift the Main Street from a Material Value centered Village to a Nonmaterial Value Village. Who will hold space for what? Where does it start? Who is holding space for the Nonmaterial Value Spaceholder school? - Write a number of proposals for how to start implementing in praticalities the shift from Material to Nonmaterial Value: Transformational Theater, Community Garden, morning Tai Chi class in the park, Children's Culture Home, TTP Healing section, Intimacy Café, Possibility House, Emotional Healing Process chamber, Rage Club session, - Nothing needs to be permanent. Energetic Spaces are interchangeable because the Energetic Space determines what is possible, not the physical space. - After you have drawn-up the Village Center based on Archan Economics, AND have implemented in Reality the first action or the next action, please register Matrix Code ARCHECON.26 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 12 Matrix Points. 
- NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play massively-multiplayer online-and-offline thoughtware-upgrade matrix-building personal-transformation real-life adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code ARCHINFR.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!

- Archan Relating - **WOMAN AND MAN**- Men and Women are different. - I'm growing increasingly frustrated and exhausted at the narrative that tries to say that we are the same… because it's harmful. - One of the greatest problems I see in my relationship work is the lack of honouring for the differences we carry. - Almost every couple that comes to me in conflict I will be able to trace it back to this. - She believes he should be more like her. - She sees the world through her own lens… how she grows, how she feels, how she takes responsibility, what she thinks is important, what she thinks a man should be — and she puts it all on him… and with this, she cages him. - He is now a hairy woman, confined to acting within her parameters of what is acceptable or not. - And he will hate being caged this way. - He will resent her for it. - She wants him to be a man, yet she views that through the lens of woman... and what a woman thinks a man should be. - And simultaneously, he does the same to her. - He understand the world as a man and looks at her like a weird alien. - She feels too much, she moves too quick, she wants too much, she doesn't make any sense. - He calls her crazy. - He acts like she is nuts. - And it stirs rage in her belly. - She will hate him for the ways he does not see her. - And then they fight about it. - Over and over and over again. - He isn't acting the way she expects. - She isn't acting the way he wants. - Instead of attempting to understand each other, they blame each other. - Resentment grows. - Love stagnates. - Everything becomes offensive. - She might not say it… but she certainly thinks it: - "If only he was more like me, things would work so much better." - As he rolls his eyes and thinks: - "If only she could just chill out for a minute, everything would be fine." - But he won't be like her. - And she won't be like him. - Isn't it bizarre??? - That we are drawn to each other in this way… - We struggle to understand how we each function, to the point where the collective resentment is so thick you could cut it with a knife. - (Have you been on Threads? It's a cesspool of gendered hate, it turns my stomach into knots some of the things that I see said there) - Yet at the same time we want each other so much. - We crave each other to the point of agony. - We yearn and want that special man or woman to come into our life... some of us wait years or decades hoping for this moment. - But it won't happen until we start growing into this truth. - We are different, and we must learn about each other. - Because one of the biggest tests we are being called to face is this: - CAN WE LOVE, HONOUR AND CELEBRATE OUR DIFFERENCES? - Not just tolerate. Not just accept. Not just get along with. - Can we be f*%king wild with desire for just how unique and different they are from us? - This seemingly simple act, to be able to truly hold differences with reverence, is what we need as a whole to evolve. - Not just in a romantic relationships… as an entire species. - If we did this, there would be no wars. - There would be no more divides. - We would be able to step into a world where everybody is free to be themselves, and loved for it. - But it starts at home. - It starts in our romantic partnerships. - It starts when a woman looks at a man and truly realises he is different — and she adores him for it. - She no longer tries to change him, or expect that he should be doing it differently than he is… instead she becomes inflamed with desire for how magnificent it is that he is not the same as her. The releases him to be a man on HIS terms. - And it starts when a man looks at a woman and settles into an awe-filled reverence for how incredibly gorgeous the feminine is in her full range of expression. - He no longer tries to control her, diminish her and keep her small. - Instead he celebrates all of her, in every facet, and says: - "More, more, yes please give me more of you". - This is a secret key to a thriving relationship. - Don't try to make them the same as you. - Instead, work really hard to understand and love the ways they are different. - This is what will evoke the deepest, most passionate, long-term intimacy. - ~ Damien Bohler

- Map of Quality of Intimacy - Also called, Map of your Context of Relating. - A Relating Space is a gameworld, it emerges out of a defined - consciously or unconsciously - context, from which unfolds the Possibility of Relating in that space. - What is the context of your Relating? - How can you re-contextualize your Relating? - Map of Intimacy Lines and Cultural Constructs 
- Archan Relating - WOMAN AND MAN - Men and Women are different. - I'm growing increasingly frustrated and exhausted at the narrative that tries to say that we are the same… because it's harmful. - One of the greatest problems I see in my relationship work is the lack of honouring for the differences we carry. - Almost every couple that comes to me in conflict I will be able to trace it back to this. - She believes he should be more like her. - She sees the world through her own lens… how she grows, how she feels, how she takes responsibility, what she thinks is important, what she thinks a man should be — and she puts it all on him… and with this, she cages him. - He is now a hairy woman, confined to acting within her parameters of what is acceptable or not. - And he will hate being caged this way. - He will resent her for it. - She wants him to be a man, yet she views that through the lens of woman... and what a woman thinks a man should be. - And simultaneously, he does the same to her. - He understand the world as a man and looks at her like a weird alien. - She feels too much, she moves too quick, she wants too much, she doesn't make any sense. - He calls her crazy. - He acts like she is nuts. - And it stirs rage in her belly. - She will hate him for the ways he does not see her. - And then they fight about it. - Over and over and over again. - He isn't acting the way she expects. - She isn't acting the way he wants. - Instead of attempting to understand each other, they blame each other. - Resentment grows. - Love stagnates. - Everything becomes offensive. - She might not say it… but she certainly thinks it: - "If only he was more like me, things would work so much better." - As he rolls his eyes and thinks: - "If only she could just chill out for a minute, everything would be fine." - But he won't be like her. - And she won't be like him. - Isn't it bizarre??? - That we are drawn to each other in this way… - We struggle to understand how we each function, to the point where the collective resentment is so thick you could cut it with a knife. - (Have you been on Threads? It's a cesspool of gendered hate, it turns my stomach into knots some of the things that I see said there) - Yet at the same time we want each other so much. - We crave each other to the point of agony. - We yearn and want that special man or woman to come into our life... some of us wait years or decades hoping for this moment. - But it won't happen until we start growing into this truth. - We are different, and we must learn about each other. - Because one of the biggest tests we are being called to face is this: - CAN WE LOVE, HONOUR AND CELEBRATE OUR DIFFERENCES? - Not just tolerate. Not just accept. Not just get along with. - Can we be f*%king wild with desire for just how unique and different they are from us? - This seemingly simple act, to be able to truly hold differences with reverence, is what we need as a whole to evolve. - Not just in a romantic relationships… as an entire species. - If we did this, there would be no wars. - There would be no more divides. - We would be able to step into a world where everybody is free to be themselves, and loved for it. - But it starts at home. - It starts in our romantic partnerships. - It starts when a woman looks at a man and truly realises he is different — and she adores him for it. - She no longer tries to change him, or expect that he should be doing it differently than he is… instead she becomes inflamed with desire for how magnificent it is that he is not the same as her. The releases him to be a man on HIS terms. - And it starts when a man looks at a woman and settles into an awe-filled reverence for how incredibly gorgeous the feminine is in her full range of expression. - He no longer tries to control her, diminish her and keep her small. - Instead he celebrates all of her, in every facet, and says: - "More, more, yes please give me more of you". - This is a secret key to a thriving relationship. - Don't try to make them the same as you. - Instead, work really hard to understand and love the ways they are different. - This is what will evoke the deepest, most passionate, long-term intimacy. - ~ Damien Bohler

- Archiarchy Makers Fair - **Edgeworkers enlivening Archiarchy, together.**
- WHAT IS ARCHIARCHY? - # Archiarchy is Next Culture- Archiarchy is the regenerative human culture naturally emerging around the world now that matriarchy and - [patriarchy](http://patriarchy.mystrikingly.com)have run their course.- Archiarchy comes to life through archetypally initiated - [adult women](http://archiarchalwomen.mystrikingly.com)creatively collaborating with archetypally initiated- [adult men](http://menscircle.mystrikingly.com).- Clearly, authentic adulthood - [initiations](http://initiations.mystrikingly.com)are key.- Once you can personally - [cavitate](https://cavitatespace.mystrikingly.com)your own culture of Archiarchy, you can carry it with you wherever you go. You- *never*have to leave it behind.- It is your birthright and your responsibility (they are the same thing) to consciously live in the culture you would love to live in. - If the culture you want to live in does not already exist, then it is your - [calling](https://archetypallineage.mystrikingly.com)to create that culture, and your pleasure to share it with anyone interested.- # Makers Of Archiarchy- Unfolding Archiarchy means reinventing every - [survival-contexted](https://survivalstrategy.mystrikingly.com)- [Patriarchal](https://patriarchy.mystrikingly.com)gameworld into a regenerative Archiarchal context, and inventing every facet Archiarchy that does not yet exist - out of nothing!- From our research, there has never been a radically-responsible initiation-centered culture ever on Planet Earth. - Nobody knows how Archiarchy goes! But not knowing does not stop a group of genius committed edgeworkers to go on the - [adventure](https://causeadventure.mystrikingly.com/)of figuring it out!- While we don't know how Archiarchy goes, we have found - *the way*to Archiarchy. It includes such endeavors as:- Sourcing [Adulthood](http://adulthood.mystrikingly.com).
- Becoming a [Possibilitator](http://possibilitatortraining.mystrikingly.com).
- Engaging and delivering [Authentic](https://becomeauthentic.mystrikingly.com)Adulthood[Initiatory](https://initiations.mystrikingly.com)[Processes](https://process.mystrikingly.com)for individuals and different groups of people.
- Building and inhabiting new [Gaian Gameworlds](https://gaiangameworlds.mystrikingly.com)that make the existing[Gameworlds](https://gameworldbuilder.mystrikingly.com)irrelevant. (They are already 'obsolete'.)
- Implementing [Archiarchal Economics](http://archiarchaleconomics.mystrikingly.com).
- Becoming a [New Refugee](http://newrefugees.mystrikingly.com).
- Activating [Whole Permaculture](http://wholepermaculture.mystrikingly.com)as an global alternative to the collapse of food shortages to come.
- Upgrading human [thoughtware](http://thoughtware.mystrikingly.com)[.](https://www.strikingly.com/s/sites/22931660/edit)
- Building infrastructures - mostly memetic infrastructure - for the emergence of regenerative cultures.
- Living in your self-made [Nanonation](https://nanonations.mystrikingly.com).
- Joining the UNN (United Network of [Nanonations](https://nanonations.mystrikingly.com)).
 - # Gaian Gameworlds- Phase 1 of Archiarchy is already complete: the culture of Archiarchy now exists as a true option to choose from on Earth. - Phase 2 of Archiarchy now begins: inhabiting Archiarchy together. This is where, you, - [Archan](https://archan.mystrikingly.com)- [Gameworld Builders](http://gameworldconsulting.mystrikingly.com)can truly shine.- Archiarchy is lived through - [cavitating](http://cavitatespace.mystrikingly.com),- [holding](http://holdspace.mystrikingly.com),- [navigating](http://navigatespace.mystrikingly.com)and deepening the- [context](http://setcontext.mystrikingly.com)of Gaian Gameworlds.- Gameworlds are the social systems through which human beings interact. - Human beings do not interact with the world as it is, we interact through gameworlds. - Each Gameworld has a - [context](http://setcontext.mystrikingly.com/),- [distinctions](https://distinction.mystrikingly.com),- [values](https://values.mystrikingly.com), rules-of-engagement (how to play the game), and an intended- [purpose](https://purposesniffer.mystrikingly.com).- In every gameworld you did not build or did not consciously choose to play, you are being used as a pawn in someone else's gameworld. - The shocking realization is that if any gameworld you play in is not repairing, renewing, and revitalizing Gaia, it is killing Life. - Almost every modern-culture gameworld is a parasite on Gaia. - A ' - [Gaian Gameworld](https://gaiangameworlds.mystrikingly.com/)' is a:- [high-drama](https://highdrama.mystrikingly.com/),- [winning-happening](https://winninghappening.mystrikingly.com/), infinite game, contexted in authentic adulthood healing and initiatory processes and- [radical responsibility](https://radicalresponsibility.mystrikingly.com/)while providing value to- [Gaia](https://becomegaia.mystrikingly.com/).- Archiarchy Maker Fair is centered on providing clarity, skills and experience in building and activating your 'Gaian Gameworld'. - We are coming together to empower each other to more effectively and abundantly nurture and heal Gaia. - The makers of Archiarchy are us! - Harbigarrr! (A Archan cry from - [Conscious Pirates](http://pirate.mystrikingly.com))
- Sourcing 
- WHO ARE THE MAKERS? - The Makers Of Archiarchy Are You! - You are: - a spaceholder for a [circle](http://yourcircle.mystrikingly.com)
- a community leader
- a [new refugee](http://newrefugees.mystrikingly.com)
- a [whole permaculturist](http://wholepermaculture.mystrikingly.com)
- a [trainer](http://beingatrainer.mystrikingly.com)
- a [health practitioner](http://feelingspractitioner.com)
- an [initiator](http://initiations.mystrikingly.com)
- a [healer](http://3phasehealing.mystrikingly.com)
- a [possibilitator](http://possibilitatortraining.mystrikingly.com)
- a [possibility manager](http://possibilitymanagers.mystrikingly.com)
- a [coach](http://possibilitycoaching.mystrikingly.com)
- an alternative [school](http://quitschool.mystrikingly.com)facilitator
- a [memetic engineering](https://memeticengineering.mystrikingly.com/)
 - You are - [at the Edge](http://gototheedge.mystrikingly.com)of what you can do alone.- You are ready to scale up your effectiveness, but you don't know where to start. This indicates the beginning of a new gameworld for you. - With painful observation, you have seen that without a gameworld into which your friends, clients, participants... the people of your Circle can join, they go back over and over to their default lifestyle in modern culture. - You realize that replacing yourself in your current 'job' is a necessity for Archiarchy to thrive. There is so much to discover, and if you don't replace yourself, what you used to deliver is lost for the next generations. - You know that the - [nonmaterial value](http://nonmaterialvalue.mystrikingly.com)that you deliver, someone else can learn it.- You want that each person in your Circle learns to deliver and share their specific nonmaterial value. - You have experienced that there are context and gameworlds that empower the potential in each person. You want to learn how to cavitate, hold, and navigate those gameworlds. - # You Seek New Skills- Creating and evolving culture is a set of - [skills](http://possibilitatorskills.mystrikingly.com).- The skills that we have developed in modern culture educating teaches us to thrive in modern culture. Most of the skills that you will need to live in your culture, you might not have - yet! - The Archiarchy Maker Fair focuses on spaceholder and gameworld builder skill-building. - Our wish is to practice these new skills together with you until we become absurdly effective. - These are skills such as: - running a group-intelligence-empowered circle
- [holding space](http://holdspace.mystrikingly.com)for a edge-discovery space
- distinguishing emotional [reactivity](http://reactivity.mystrikingly.com)so it does not block the creation process
- [seeing the edge](https://gototheedge.mystrikingly.com/)of a gameworld, going there and experimenting at the edge
- make [proposals](http://proposals.mystrikingly.com/)and[transformational proposals](http://transformationalproposals.mystrikingly.com/)
- [negotiating intimacy](http://negotiateintimacy.mystrikingly.com/)
- scanning and empowering the [knacks](http://knacks.mystrikingly.com/), potential, skills and intelligence of each unique human being in your Circle
- building Your [Circle](http://yourcircle.mystrikingly.com)through[Legends Making](http://legendmaking.mystrikingly.com)
- ongoing deepening the [context](http://setcontext.mystrikingly.com/)of your gameworld
- and landing that new context in already participating members
- exiting [hierarchical](http://thehierarchy.mystrikingly.com/)and leadership habitual pattern
- being a [guardian](http://4lineages.mystrikingly.com/)of an extraordinarily empowering space
- shift from a sharing Circle to [Creative Collaboration](http://creativecollaboration.mystrikingly.com/)Circle
- build a Gameworld Builder Trainer Training within your gameworld for them to build the next gameworld
- sharpening your [Gameworld Consultant](https://gameworldconsulting.mystrikingly.com/)- abandoning the idea that you need to [know](http://knowinghow.mystrikingly.com/)
- [going nonlinear](http://gononlinear.mystrikingly.com/)
- [being unreasonable](http://gounreasonable.mystrikingly.com/)

- Archiarchy Makers Fair - Edgeworkers enlivening Archiarchy, together. 
- WHAT IS ARCHIARCHY? - Archiarchy is Next Culture- Archiarchy is the regenerative human culture naturally emerging around the world now that matriarchy and patriarchy have run their course. - Archiarchy comes to life through archetypally initiated adult women creatively collaborating with archetypally initiated adult men. - Clearly, authentic adulthood initiations are key. - Once you can personally cavitate your own culture of Archiarchy, you can carry it with you wherever you go. You never have to leave it behind. - It is your birthright and your responsibility (they are the same thing) to consciously live in the culture you would love to live in. - If the culture you want to live in does not already exist, then it is your calling to create that culture, and your pleasure to share it with anyone interested. - Makers Of Archiarchy- Unfolding Archiarchy means reinventing every survival-contexted Patriarchal gameworld into a regenerative Archiarchal context, and inventing every facet Archiarchy that does not yet exist - out of nothing! - From our research, there has never been a radically-responsible initiation-centered culture ever on Planet Earth. - Nobody knows how Archiarchy goes! But not knowing does not stop a group of genius committed edgeworkers to go on the adventure of figuring it out! - While we don't know how Archiarchy goes, we have found the way to Archiarchy. It includes such endeavors as: - Sourcing Adulthood.
- Becoming a Possibilitator.
- Engaging and delivering Authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processes for individuals and different groups of people.
- Building and inhabiting new Gaian Gameworlds that make the existing Gameworlds irrelevant. (They are already 'obsolete'.)
- Implementing Archiarchal Economics.
- Becoming a New Refugee.
- Activating Whole Permaculture as an global alternative to the collapse of food shortages to come.
- Upgrading human thoughtware.
- Building infrastructures - mostly memetic infrastructure - for the emergence of regenerative cultures.
- Living in your self-made Nanonation.
- Joining the UNN (United Network of Nanonations ).
 - Gaian Gameworlds- Phase 1 of Archiarchy is already complete: the culture of Archiarchy now exists as a true option to choose from on Earth. - Phase 2 of Archiarchy now begins: inhabiting Archiarchy together. This is where, you, Archan Gameworld Builders can truly shine. - Archiarchy is lived through cavitating, holding, navigating and deepening the context of Gaian Gameworlds. - Gameworlds are the social systems through which human beings interact. - Human beings do not interact with the world as it is, we interact through gameworlds. - Each Gameworld has a context, distinctions, values, rules-of-engagement (how to play the game), and an intended purpose. - In every gameworld you did not build or did not consciously choose to play, you are being used as a pawn in someone else's gameworld. - The shocking realization is that if any gameworld you play in is not repairing, renewing, and revitalizing Gaia, it is killing Life. - Almost every modern-culture gameworld is a parasite on Gaia. - A 'Gaian Gameworld' is a: high-drama, winning-happening, infinite game, contexted in authentic adulthood healing and initiatory processes and radical responsibility while providing value to Gaia. - Archiarchy Maker Fair is centered on providing clarity, skills and experience in building and activating your 'Gaian Gameworld'. - We are coming together to empower each other to more effectively and abundantly nurture and heal Gaia. - The makers of Archiarchy are us! - Harbigarrr! (A Archan cry from Conscious Pirates) 
- WHO ARE THE MAKERS? - The Makers Of Archiarchy Are You! - You are: - a spaceholder for a circle
- a community leader
- a new refugee
- a whole permaculturist
- a trainer
- a health practitioner
- an initiator
- a healer
- a possibilitator
- a possibility manager
- a coach
- an alternative school facilitator
- a memetic engineering
 - You are at the Edge of what you can do alone. - You are ready to scale up your effectiveness, but you don't know where to start. This indicates the beginning of a new gameworld for you. - With painful observation, you have seen that without a gameworld into which your friends, clients, participants... the people of your Circle can join, they go back over and over to their default lifestyle in modern culture. - You realize that replacing yourself in your current 'job' is a necessity for Archiarchy to thrive. There is so much to discover, and if you don't replace yourself, what you used to deliver is lost for the next generations. - You know that the nonmaterial value that you deliver, someone else can learn it. - You want that each person in your Circle learns to deliver and share their specific nonmaterial value. - You have experienced that there are context and gameworlds that empower the potential in each person. You want to learn how to cavitate, hold, and navigate those gameworlds. - You Seek New Skills- Creating and evolving culture is a set of skills. - The skills that we have developed in modern culture educating teaches us to thrive in modern culture. Most of the skills that you will need to live in your culture, you might not have - yet! - The Archiarchy Maker Fair focuses on spaceholder and gameworld builder skill-building. - Our wish is to practice these new skills together with you until we become absurdly effective. - These are skills such as: - running a group-intelligence-empowered circle
- holding space for a edge-discovery space
- distinguishing emotional reactivity so it does not block the creation process
- seeing the edge of a gameworld, going there and experimenting at the edge
- make proposals and transformational proposals
- negotiating intimacy
- scanning and empowering the knacks, potential, skills and intelligence of each unique human being in your Circle
- building Your Circle through Legends Making
- ongoing deepening the context of your gameworld
- and landing that new context in already participating members
- exiting hierarchical and leadership habitual pattern
- being a guardian of an extraordinarily empowering space
- shift from a sharing Circle to Creative Collaboration Circle
- build a Gameworld Builder Trainer Training within your gameworld for them to build the next gameworld
- sharpening your Gameworld Consultant skills.
- abandoning the idea that you need to know
- going nonlinear
- being unreasonable
- taking a stand for something that other people might not understand

 - These skills, and others that could practice in small group during the Maker Fair. - Courage- It takes courage to join a group of strangers to practice skills that you maybe have never of before today. - Joining the Archiarchy Maker Fair, you admit that you do not know everything, that you will make mistake, and try things... some of it will work... some of it won't... - In the Archiarchy Maker Team, we are okay 'looking bad'.
