text:
- There are so many ways to barricade yourself in... or out. - So many places you have installed Barriers instead of Doorways. - Barriers in yourself, or between you and others... - Barriers between you and Possibility... - Barriers between you and Clarity... you and Love. - Who put those Barriers there? - Who can take them away? - Who would you be without those Barriers? - Perhaps it is time to find out... 
- Your Barriers Are Self Made - No one can make a barrier for you.- More depressingly, no one can stop you from making barriers for yourself.- YOUR POWER AS A BARRIER MAKER- Why would you want to make Barriers for yourself? - This seems like a reasonable question to ask. - The answer turns out to be counterintuitive, but simple to understand, once you perceive the Purpose. - The Purpose of putting yourself under the restraints of a Barrier is to diminish yourself in the eyes of other people around you so that you fit in and are acceptable to your tribe. - If you are not accepted by your tribe, you will be rejected. - If your tribe rejects you, you die. - This experience is deep in our cells. - In order to not die, you reject your Knacks, buffer your Compass Of Reality, dull your Sword Of Clarity (or forget you even have one), give away your Center, be Adaptive, abandon your own Authority, act confused (Box #13), lose your Real Voice, refuse to Say What You Want, decline to Make Boundaries, suppress your Feelings, mix your Emotions, Lie, Contaminate your Adult Egostate with your Child Egostate, Parent Egostate, Gremlin Egostate, or Demon Egostate, you direct your own Gremlin to cannibalize you, you enter into Fantasy Worlds, come up with really good Reasons, you go into Denial, create Self Deceptions, make yourself afraid of Connection, and so on. - You suppress your own awareness expansion. You submit yourself to circumstances in which your Survival Strategy works. Essentially, you kill yourself before anyone else has a chance to do it for you. Once you are disempowered, you are not a problem for them anymore. - You do not get to Live. But you do get to survive. - Without Authentic Adulthood Initiatory Proceses, survival is as far as you can go. - We are interested in empowering you to go further than that. We are interested in you Living Full Out instead of merely surviving. - THE ILLUSION OF THE BARRIER OF YOUR BIRTH CULTURE- Some people imagine that they are limited because of the limitations of the culture they are born into. - Have you ever imagined that? - After all, culture has such a strong influence on our lives. - Culture determines what languages you speak, right? And if you do not understand English, how else could you read this website? (Uh, well, what about asking Google to translate this page for you?) - Culture decides how you should behave if you are female or male, and what your status is, right? - Culture tries to suffocate you in religious beliefs that subvert your clear thinking, awareness, authority and intelligence. How do you get out of your religious commitments? - Culture tries to force you into an educational system that cuts you off from your imagination, undermines your ability to ask real question, forces you to be adaptive to an authoritarian hierarchical system that judges you and grades you. How do you get out of years of being trained to be an adaptive follower? - Where did culture come from? Do you think it has always been this way? - Human beings are culture inventors. - 100,000 years ago, humans lived in Matriarchal cultures where the Great Mother Earth fed us from a free, all you can eat walk-in salad bar. - 10,000 years ago humans invented Patriarchal cultures where whichever psychopathic brute could climb to the top of the hierarchy fastest got to decide policies. - At the turn of the 21st Century, a new culture began emerging around the world, built by Cultural Creatives. It is the regenerative, radically responsible, adulthood initiation centered toroidal cultures of Archiarchy. - Who decides which culture you get to live in? - You have an energetic Point Of Origin that is mobile. - You have the power to extract your Point Of Origin from any culture you are born into, and replant your Point Of Origin into the Context of the culture you would love to live in. - In many ways, unleashing your power to consciously relocate your Point Of Origin is the central aim of Possibility Management. - THE ILLUSION OF THE BARRIER OF NOT ENOUGH MONEY- Some people imagine that they are limited because they do not have enough money. - Have you ever imagined that? - It is rather humorous to think that 'not having enough money' is stopping you from anything. - The reason that this is funny is because there is already so much money in the world. - What are you doing to stop this huge flow of money all around you from going through your bank account on its way to all the other bank accounts? What are you doing to keep your bank account out of the money loops? - Not having enough money is not what is stopping you from having enough money. - What is stopping you from having enough money is that you are not communicating with other people about what you are wanting to do. You are not explaining to those people how they too can be involved in what you want to do. You are not Making Legends that attract people to what you are creating and inviting them to join you. - Because if you communicated what you want to do, explain how it goes, and excitedly invite people to creatively collaborate with you, then the thing would happen. - Think of a luxury cruise ship. It is a monster, so many staff needed, so many mechanical systems to maintain, so expensive to run, and yet, when three-thousand customers come together and creatively collaborate, that ship leaves harbor and cruises around the world. One person almost certainly does not have enough money to make the cruise ship run, but when people read the advertisement, understand how to reserve a compartment, select their options, pay their share of the fees, pack their bags and their sun cream and cameras, there is suddenly more than enough money. - It is not that you do not have enough money to do anything you want to do. It is that you are not organizing a gameworld through which other people can come together and help you make it happen. - So, why aren't you communicating, explaining, inviting, and Legend Making? It could easily be a Past Life Vow still operating in you to force you to play small and not stand up for your vision in order to keep you from being killed by the church, or the villagers, or the kings soldiers... again. By going through one or more Pasl Life Vow Emotional Healing Processes, all of your Barriers can vanish. - It is not that you do not have enough money. It is that you are not sharing your alivenes. - THE ILLUSION OF THE BARRIER OF NOT ENOUGH TIME OR ENERGY - Some people imagine that they are limited because they do not have enough time or energy. - Have you ever imagined that? - It is rather humorous to think that 'not having enough time or energy in your day' is stopping you from anything. - The reason that this is funny is because there are so many people in the world. - Yes, it is true, that each person wakes up in the morning with the same energy as everyone else. What? You thought Mother Therese had solar powered battery packs on her belt, or was taking super vitamins as she created her 'Missionaries of Charity' gameworld with over 4,500 nuns across 133 countries managing homes for people dying of HIV/AIDS, leprosy, or tuberculosis, providing soup kitchens, dispensaries, mobile clinics, children's and family counselling programes, as well as orphanages and schools? - She did not. Mother Therese woke up each morning with the same time and energy as you or I have, and only twenty-four hours in each day. - What are you actually doing with your time and energy? - Are you creating Confusion, Reactivity, Low Drama, really good Reasons, Lies, Prejudices, Self Deception, Denial, Assumptions, Expectations, Conclusions, Projections, Resentment, Self Cannibalism, Judgements, Competition, Justifications, being Adaptive, or Manipulation? Are you using Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.)? - Are you a slave Zombie in a corporate prison job? Are you a Refugee trying to put some bread in your belly? Are you a Handsome Holy Tribal Man? Or are you taking steps on your Path to building Gaian Gameworlds through which you construct Archan Infrastructure for delivering the Nonmaterial Value of your Archetypal Lineage and your Bright Principles? - One way or another, you are ongoingly Creating. - The question is, does your Creation serve a Conscious or Unconscious Purpose? - How calibrated is your Compass Of Reality? What are you actually Committed to? Which Memetic Construct forces or constrains your pattern of Creation? Where is your Team? In what Context is your Cavitation and Spaceholding? What is your Gameplan? - It is an illusion to think that you are limited by not having enough time or energy. Your barriers come from living inside of a large NOW and not organizing Winning Happening gameworlds for the Creative Collaboration of your Teams. - Hmmmm.... - Interesting... - THE ILLUSION OF THE BARRIER OF NOT ENOUGH INTELLIGENCE- ...perhaps you are beginning to see a pattern here? - The 'American lone wolf single fighter' Survival Strategy limits you to relying on your own meager intelligence. - Why is your intelligence meager? Because only one of your 4 Brains is dominant: red, green, blue, or yellow. (Do you know which one?) By depending solely on your own brain type, you lose out on the other 3 brains' perceptions, viewpoints, strengths, and intelligences. If at least one person from each of the 4 dominant brain categories is not in the Infinity Ring of your gameworld, if they are not in your Team, if you do not have multicolored brains in your circle, you have handicapped yourself. - In addition to the 4 Brain factor, if you participate in a gameworld that uses a hierarchical power structure - a pyramid - you depend on the limited top-down intelligence located 'above you' in the organization (which is, by default, primarily psychopathic... serving a psycopathic agenda, which is certainly not to create a bright future for life on Earth). Simultaneously you waste all the broad-band intelligence located 'below you' in the hierarchy. Vast swaths of intelligence are suppressed and disregarded every day if you use a hierarchical power structure. - It is a painfully bad joke to think of yourself as being limited because you do not have access to enough intelligence and Possibility. What are your alternatives? - Bring together a circular Team in a Winning Happening Context, and use Torus Meeting Technology. Suddenly you unleash a tsunami of intelligence that was there all the time, but due to poor gameworld design (or due to Hidden Purpose...) this intelligence resource has been ignored and suppressed. - THE ILLUSION OF BEING A VICTIM OF WHAT HAPPENED TO YOU AS A CHILD- Each of us had a childhood and an adolescence. - No way around it. - Every experience that did or did not happen to you was an opportunity for you to build a strong or weak Inner Structure. - You tried to understand what was happening to you. You tried to survive. You did whatever it took, and you made it. You did survive. - The Memetic Construct you built out of the Stories and Conclusions that you attached to the incidents and accidents of your childhood and adolescence needed to somehow hang together inside of your Survival Strategy. This is how you are Radically Responsible for designing your world. You bent your stories to fit into your Survival Strategy. - You are the one who attached the meaning to every thing that happened to you, and the meaning of what you did or did not do about it. This means that you are not a Victim of what happened to you as a child. You are the creator of its meaning. - Do you have any brothers or sisters? If so, they experienced essentially the same childhood and adolescence as you did. But, are they the same as you? Probably not. Did they Choose to attach the same meaning and interpretations that you did to what happened to them? Probably not. - (Clinton: "My parents were neurotic about giving me and my two brothers identical opportunities throughout our childhood and adolescence. This was horrible at Christmas time, because whoever opened their Christmas present from our parents first revealed what was wrapped in the boxes of the other two. Yet the three 'boys' invented three different interpretations and meanings for what happened to us, built three unique worldviews, and we turned out as different as water, oil, and light.") - It does not matter what culture you were born into. It does not matter who or what your parents were, or were not. You designed your interpretations so that you could survive. Period. And your creation worked. You did survive. So your Gameplan was not wrong or bad or stupid. - But... - ...you designed your Box. Your Box determines how you view your past, your present, your future, yourself, and other people. Your Box determines how you should live in a world like this with people like them. - Since you designed the way you see things, then the way you see things now is the way you want to see things. - Why do you want ot keep seeing things this way? (Revenge, perhaps? Excuses, perhaps?) - The effect on you of your childhood or adolescence does not limit you in any way because you carry the interpretations which you consciously or unconsciously want to carry. - The way you interpret what happened to you, or what did not happen to you, in your childhood, is mutable. It is changeable. The meanings you hold are completely flexible. There are no laws forcing you to maintain any particular interpretation of what happened to you in your childhood. You are not forced to play out a Victim or Rescuer or Persecutor rold. Changing your interpretations has the same power as changing the style of your clothing. It gives you a different 'look'. - Your current interpretations of your childhood exist for you now only because you consistently sustain them that way. - If you do not put effort into clinging onto your original interpretations, they would fall off in a few moments. Then you would drop into a neutral uncharged condition, far closer to objective reality, giving you amplified Agency in your life. - It is an illusion to think that you are limited in any way by what happened to you as a child. Since you invented how it looked to you back then, you can instantly reinvent how it looks to you now in such a way that your interpretations make you "...brave, and kind, and healthy, and happy." (from the book Cat's Cradle by Kurt Vonnegut Jr. - it's on The List...) - AND SO ON...- Your barriers are self made. 
- Varieties Of Barriers - It can help to understand the anatomy of your Barriers.- YOU MAKE BARRIERS FOR YOURSELF IN EACH OF YOUR 5 BODIES- Making Barriers for yourself is common, and the abundance of Barriers that you see other people making for themselves makes the Barriers they make seem reasonable. - It is a breakthrough to Notice that different kinds of Barriers affect different Bodies in different ways. - The first Eureka moment comes from Observing that each of your 5 Bodies is stopped or diminished by its own specific kinds of Barriers. - Once you see this, it becomes massively easier to understand why and how you made a certain Barrier for yourself, and thereby massively easier to specifically Debarrierize yourself. - PHYSICAL BODY BARRIERS- It seems obvious that your Physical Body has recognizeable and predetermined Barriers built in due the design and structure of your Physical Barrier. For example, you do not have sensitivity in your eyes to see frequencies of light above or below certain frequencies. You do not have the facility to perceive sounds above or below certain vibratios. The human body can only move at a certain maximum or minimum speed. You have limited smell and taste receptors. Your skin will fry or freeze if temperatures are too hot or too cold. You can only hold your breath so long before you require more oxygen to breathe. You cannot carry more than a certain number of kilograms before your muscles will tear away from your bones or your joints will collapse. - INTELLECTUAL BODY BARRIERS- Thinking that it is important to know. - Thinking that you do not know, or do not know how. - Deciding that you are a failure, incompetent, or not good enough, and therefore starting off with a black mark against you. - Choosing to neglect invitations to new Possibility. - Assuming that other can do something or be something or have something, cut you cannot. - Projecting an old situation onto a new person or new situation, thereby blocking yourself from the Present, and thereby blocking you from your Power, your Agency. - Believing that it is not okay to be yourself if you are different from anyone else. - Concluding that your perceptions are true and others are not. - EMOTIONAL BODY BARRIERS- The first of the Four Enemies of a Possibilitator on the Path is Fear. Unconscious Fear. - Fear of gaining clarity about Inner Navigating your 4 Feelings and your 4 Emotions. - ENERGETIC BODY BARRIERS- Energetic Blocks - Blocks against having Power. - ARCHETYPAL BODY BARRIERS- Barriers against the evolution of awareness and consciousness. 
- Debarrierizing Yourself - It can help to understand the anatomy of your Barriers.- YOU CAN DEBARRIERIZE YOURSELF IN EACH OF YOUR 5 BODIES- DEBARRIERIZING YOUR PHYSICAL BODY- DEBARRIERIZING YOUR INTELLECTUAL BODY- DEBARRIERIZING YOUR EMOTIONAL BODY- DEBARRIERIZING YOUR ENERGETIC BODY- DEBARRIERIZING YOUR ARCHETYPAL BODY
- Debarrierize Yourself Experiments- No one can experiment for you.- More interestingly, no one can stop you from experimenting.- Experimenting builds Matrix for collecting more consciousness.- With more consciousness, you see more options to choose from, including the frightening ones.- What you decide, however, is still up to you.- DISSOLVE THE BARRIER GLUE IN YOUR CLUSTER - Matrix Code DEBARRIE.00 - You have come together with2, 3, 4 or more people who have the same barrier as you, in a 3cell, in a pt team, in a woman's team so that you can protect your barrier. Find who you have your cluster with and dissolve by putting it on the table, change the purpose of the cluster into debarrierizing yourself together - GET RADICALLY HONEST ABOUT THE BARRIERS OF YOUR CHURCH OR RELIGION - Matrix Code DEBARRIE.00 - BE RADICALLY HONEST ABOUT THE BARRIERS OF YOUR CULTURE - Matrix Code DEBARRIE.00 - GET RADICALLY HONEST ABOUT THE BARRIERS OF YOUR PARENTS - Matrix Code DEBARRIE.00 - Write in your beep book, spend an hour writing in your beep book, all the barriers you can think of about your parents, regardless of you adopting them or not. go to your 3cell or pt team, and ask people to tell you which barriers from your parents you still conform to. And write down your fears of the consequences of not conforming to the barriers of your parents. Do any ehps that might come. - ENTER SILENCE TO NOTICE THE BARRIER THAT YOU USE BY SPEAKING - Matrix Code DEBARRIE.00 - enter at least 3 day silent advance, and go about your life as usual. put a little sign saying I am in silence. Notice how you barrierize yourself from speaking especially from your mind. - HIRE A PERSON TO BE WITH YOU FOR 3 DAYS ALL DAY LONG TO TELL YOU EVERY TIME YOU LIE TO YOURSELF OR ANYBODY ELSE - Matrix Code DEBARRIE.00 - The person has to detect lies of omission, lies of exageration, lies of diminishing and outright non factual lies, lies of deception and not once beat yourself up. The only to not beat yourself up is everytime there is a lie you find out why and you write down in your beep book, I lie to this person so that, to avoid being seen, to avoid commitment, to avoid being liked, whatever the reason. Fill up your beep book with how you use lies as barriers. - DEBARRIARIZE YOUR LONE WOLF SURVIVAL BY ASKING FOR GROUP INTELLIGENCE EVERYTIME YOU ARE AFRAID - Matrix Code DEBARRIE.00 - Everytime you are afraid of saying the wrong thing, not knowing what you want, afraid of making a mistake, afraid of being rejected, afraid of being killed. You ask your team what you could say, what you could do, and then do it, immediately, if you don't do it, you are still barrierizing yourself as a lone wolf. - FOR 3 DAYS AND 2 NIGHTS TAKE OFF ALL YOUR CLOTHES AND GO NAKED - Matrix Code DEBARRIE.00 - This is about using clothes as a barrier. Arrange this at certain beaches, certain campgrounds or certain resorts. This is not about having an orgy or sex, it is simply about not using clothes as a barrier. Write up what you learn as an article. The proof is the link to the published article. - DEBARRIARIZE YOUR PATH OF EVOLUTION - Matrix Code DEBARRIE.00 - You think you have made it, you have any notion that you have made it as a possibilitator, coach, healer. Write a fiction short story about how a person on the path would plateau themselve, what did they do, the ways they did it, to make it easy or safe or barriarized. - RUN AS FAR AND AS FAST AS YOU CAN SEVEN DAYS IN A ROW - Matrix Code DEBARRIE.00 - Each morning at exactly 8 oclock you run straight, as fast, as far and as hard as you can until you drop. You run full out and when you fall down you make a mark. Next morning start again, same place, same time, and run as far, as fast, as hard as you can until you drop and make a mark. Next morning, start again, same time, exactly 8 oclock. Each time you fall down make it dramatic. And write down all your reasons and excuses and stories and judgements about why you fell down there. Publish all seven of those, excuse essays in one article. As proof, put down the link. - CARRY A 1000 EUROS IN YOUR POCKET IN YOUR WALLET - Matrix Code DEBARRIE.00 - EAT SEVEN CHOCOLAT BANANA SPLITS IN A ROW AND SEE WHAT YOUR BARRIERS ARE - Matrix Code DEBARRIE.00 - In your mother. - GO TO ART MUSEUM AND APRECIATE ONE PIECE OF ART WITHOUT A BARRIER - Matrix Code DEBARRIE.00 - Spend one hour in each of your five bodies appreciating this piece of art experientially in your five bodies. You might write about it, and your emotional body may use the whole box of tissues, your energetic body may be in ecstasy or repulsion, your archetypal body may give a speaeh about the beauty, your physical body may do one hundred push ups, or dancing around the thing. In each case go beyond your ordinary barriers. Note: remember the 3rd rule, don't get arrested. - GO TO YOUR PARTNER AND APPRECIATE THEM AS A PIECE OF ART - Matrix Code DEBARRIE.00 - Spend one hour in each of your five bodies appreciating this piece of art experientially in your five bodies. You might write about it, and your emotional body may use the whole box of tissues, your energetic body may be in ecstasy or repulsion, your archetypal body may give a speaeh about the beauty, your physical body may do one hundred push ups, or dancing around the thing. In each case go beyond your ordinary barriers. Note: remember the 3rd rule, don't get arrested. - DEBARRIARIZE YOURSELF FROM FAIRNESS - Matrix Code DEBARRIE.00 - pay for the meal even when you hate the people at the meal table. On the contrary if you have a tendacy to always pay more, pay less. Or ask other people to pay for you, even if it is not fair. If you are a person who doesn't speak, speak for the whole meeting, and also speak for everybody that is not speaking. Eat all the brocoli, don't leave anything for anybody else. - GIVE PEOPLE YOUR PLACE IN LINE - Matrix Code DEBARRIE.00 - And go to the end of the line. After that, leave your place in line and go to the front of the line. - GIVE PEOPLE THE EXACT AMOUNT OF TIME THEY ARE ALLOWED TO SPEAK - Matrix Code DEBARRIE.00 - You speak for four minutes and then stop. - COMMIT TO DO THIS EXPERIMENT BEFORE YOU KNOW WHAT THE EXPERIMENT IS - Matrix Code DEBARRIE.00 - Don't read this experiment unless you have already commited and if you read byond here without having commited, go back to the experiment about lying, because you are lying to yourself, because it is so low, and degrading, by now you better be commited. This experimetn is in the next 24h do whatever it takes to plant 3 trees in the earth, not in a pot, where they could grow. Take a picture of your 3 trees, upload them, and send the link to the photo as your proof. - MAKE A NEW WEBSITE FOR YOURSELF BEFORE THE END OF THIS WEEK ABOUT YOUR HIDDEN TALENTS - Matrix Code DEBARRIE.00 - your hidden talents might be knacks, your archetypal lineage, your magical powers, your secret recipes from your mom. This would be on your website about your gifts, your taksu, this is a balinese word that means your inexplicable your gaia given talent with which you were born with. - CALL UP SÓNIA GONÇALVES AND HAVE HER DEBARRIARIZE YOU - Matrix Code DEBARRIE.00 - https:///soniamaiago.mystrikingly.com - It only costs 25€ and be prepared for liquid states. - BE WITH SOMEONE FOR AN HOUR THAT HAS WAY HIGHER STATUS THAN YOU - Matrix Code DEBARRIE.00 - Write up an article about this. - BE WITH SOMEONE FOR AN HOUR THAT HAS WAY LOWER STATUS THAN YOU - Matrix Code DEBARRIE.00 - Write up an article about this.

- **Detecting The Disjointment Survival Strategy**- A few common features of the Disjointment Survival Strategy: - **No One Reliable At Home:**- **People have parts**- **—Gremlin parts, Child parts, Parent parts, parts from Mom, parts from Dad, parts for handling the police, parts for only speaking about logistics, Red- / Blue- / Green- / Yellow-brain parts, and on and on. There are also Adult parts. Over the course of initiation, transformation, and practice, the Adult parts in a person strengthen and broaden so that when you say "Hello" to such a person and they say "Hello" back, it is obvious that you are speaking to the Adult. You can build a relational foundation with such a person, can negotiate intimacy, can make agreements. You might even say that there is something "real" here in this Adult part. When a person has a Disjointment Strategy, there is nobody home to say "Hello" to. There might be a disarming, thoughtful, powerful, empathetic, sweet Adult mask—and a convincing one at that!—but this is just part of the show, a façade cobbled together from watching how other people do the Adult thing. Disillusionment about the Adult mask occurs in many ways. One key is that over time, you hear, see, or detect "slips." Slips are actions, comments, or other moves that reveal the inner world and workings happening behind the Adult mask. Often, it ain't pretty. The disparity between the Adult mask and the inner world can be so shockingly great that it is jarring for an outside observer to witness. It might even seem like something is out of joint. That's because it is.**
- __A Life of Being Betrayed:__
- __A Trail of Bodies:__
- __Paranoia:__"Who's after me? Who's talking about me? My ears are burning. Someone must be talking about me. I'm on the outside. They're on the inside. Do they notice this? Can I trick them into thinking I'm on the inside? Someone's coming. Ok, just smile and say hello as they pass. (Hello!) Did they notice? They looked at me funny. No, I think I fooled them this time."
- __A History of Being "Kicked Out:"__
- **Built-In-Forgetter:**- **This term comes from a share a woman made during a meeting of Alcoholics Anonymous (AA) many years ago. The share went like this: "**I've been coming to AA for 25 years. I keep coming. Why? Because it's called alcohol-IS-m, not alcohol-WAS-m. And, I've got a- **BUILT-IN-FORGETTER**. I remember why I'm sober the moment I step foot in the meeting. But give me 24 hours, and I start forgetting..." The Disjointment Strategy also comes with a built-in-forgetter. A process happens, a person recognizes that their paranoia and teamless-ness are illusions, the crack begins, and then a few hours go by, and BAM... the built-in-forgetter kicks in, and everyone's the enemy again.
 
- # Disjointment: Symptoms & Healing Process
- **Description Of Disjointment**- *Fearcraft*, the book, is not published yet. It could still take a while for- [Thoughtware Press](http://thoughtwarepress.mystrikingly.com)to make the book ready.- In the meantime, there are things you can do to prepare yourself for reading the book. - The first thing we think of is: participate in - [Fear Club](http://fearclub.mystrikingly.com).- There are so many astonishing things to experience while exploring the inner territories of Conscious Fear. - And the perfect place to experience these things is in the held and navigated safe space of Fear Club. - Fear Club connects you in with a Team of fellow 'fear explorers', doing Experiments, meeting Challenges, staying at The Edge and finding out what is really going on. This is the - [Path](http://path.mystrikingly.com)of becoming- [Radically Responsible](http://radicalresponsibility.mystrikingly.com)for your Fear.- By finding out what is going on, you simultaneously discover what is - [Possible](http://possibility.mystrikingly.com).- And, what is Possible that you were not aware of before, could inpire you to live more in accordance with who you are and what you are here to create rather than scratching out some kind of life for the purpose of avoiding fear because you have labeled the experience of fear as 'bad', 'negative', or 'dangerous'. - Fear Club brings you through this popular but swampy maze into new territory, where your Fear empowers your Agency as an Adult by providing you with timely energy impulses and insightful relevant information. Rather than blocking the experience of Fear at all costs, you become Fear, breathe Fear, ride your Fear like a Dragon that you were once afraid of, but empirically discover to be your - [best friend](https://sparks.nextculture.org/res/sparks/Spark-149-en.pdf).- Perhaps by the time you participate in Fear Club once or twice, and become a - [Fear Club Spaceholder](http://fearclubspaceholdertraining.mystrikingly.com)yourself to help others transform their relationship with Fear, the book will be finished!
- **Facing Into Starting Over Someplace Completely Different**- **RESEARCH NOTES**- A few notes on the Disjointment strategy... from Devin Gleeson. - At least two people I used to spend time with who had the Disjointment strategy also had a special relationship with non-human forces or realms. I was often suspicious of their claims about these non-human forces, because they would get messages from these forces at times that were very convenient for the protection of their Survival Strategies. A crude example would be something along these lines: Someone shares confronting feedback with the Disjointment person, and soon after, the Disjointment person gets a message 'from the stars' (or whatever) that the person sharing the feedback is in some way evil. This could happen even with friendships they'd had for years. - I have heard something similar in the way one person talks about ECCO... - *"ECCO took me away from this ecovillage so that I could go to the next Gaian project..."*My detector translates this as something like,- *"I cannot connect authentically, and when that becomes obvious to the people I'm with, I disappear."*- The people I am now referring to as using the Disjointment Survival Strategy I have previously called Borderline. Gosh, I feel sad to think of some of these people, since I have loved them and seen both how trapped they are, and how powerless I am to do anything in the face of their Strategy. - One of the other people I knew was a colleague at a tech company I worked for. Over the course of maybe two years of knowing her, she very slowly revealed different parts of her Underworld to me (eating disorders, self-harm, spite, envy in the sense that Shakespeare called 'green-eyed envy'). What was striking to me was how deeply distinct her Underworld was from the face she showed to the world. My scanning is hopefully more refined now, but at the time, it was shocking to me. - Looking back, I think what also disturbed me is that I could not locate a stable thing in her. There was the Face-I-Show-The-World, there was the Evil-Underworld, there was the part of her that might be smashed to smithereens in hysteria, but there was no one there I could say, "Hello," to, in a manner where that person would clearly say, "Hello," back to me. - I heard the the word 'unreliable' used as a descriptive, and it fits. This is exactly what I am missing in such people, a part that is reliable. - ## REPORT AFTER A DISJOINTMENT HEALING PROCESS - A REJOINTMENT- "Disjointment or remembering a time before the time" - Can you remember a time and space where all needs are fulfilled? I mean all needs. All needs of all your 5 bodies? - I could not until recently. - Fulfilling my needs. Thinking about fulfilling my needs. Making plans about fulfilling my needs. Meaning most of the time sensing a lack. Sensing something missing. - This was familiar for me, most of my lifetime, most of my adult lifetime doing so with the approach of doing the work to fulfill my needs. - But what are my needs? That which I assumed I needed to be fulfilled. That which I collected in the quest of being fulfilled… - It is endless and exhausting. What "it" am I talking about? What I mean is being on a quest and not getting any further to where I want to be. An ocean of sadness filled by the small sadnesses all along the way of wanting to be nourished, wanting to be nurtured, wanting to be taken care of. - A lifelong longing inside of me to be in connection, be in relating, to simply be and a collection of not getting there, not getting it, not getting any further. - Relating spaces are a beautiful playground or battlefield for the quest to experience this heart need. - This is where I realized it in the most painful, most intense way outside of me, what is already happening inside of me. - Being taught and learned at a young age to observe myself, and by that, I mean observe my emotions, feelings, thoughts, and behavioral patterns and dynamics in my life, I created this neutral observer outside of me who can see clearly, at least most of the time. And writing that, I know this is bullshit and absolutely not true but just a story to create this illusion of having control over what feels sometimes as absolute madness in life. - I noticed over the course of time that I have this part in me that is attracted, drawn to and with admiration for strong, dangerous, adventurous wild women. That part loses itself in the exotic dream world of how life would be and could be with such a woman by my side. I called that part later on the "Spiritual Adventurer." Later, more about that fellow. - And in all relating spaces which I called relationships until very lately, I realized there is an opposing part that feels threatened by such a strong, dangerous, adventurous and wild woman. This part had the tendency to suppress a woman that showed these behaviors. I called that part "Reihenhaus Dad." - If you are not familiar with the German word Reihenhaus, I am sure you get it when I paint you a picture. Have you seen these houses that are built the same, sometimes entire roads or communities with the same shape, same amount of garden, same parkway, sometimes with the same cars parking in front of the houses? A Reihenhaus is exactly that type of building, and a Reihenhaus Dad is exactly a man who you imagine to live in such a habitat. - These two parts are in conflict with each other and draw others into the conflict. As I have stated earlier, "battlefield," and this describes best how my "relationships" felt for myself and the partners at that time. The love that has been there has been killed, shot in the heart. The aliveness has been chased away, and a dictatorship of a rigid regime killed every glimpse of connection and spread a culture of emotional fear of punishment, torture, and connection. - Harsh pictures? - My inside for a long time. - An ocean of sadness engulfs me due to this unfulfilled need to connect, relate, and be in intimate spaces. It is covered up by a wall of anger built around the stories I've created about my own abilities to be in intimate relating and the people I have related to. Numbed with fear, not knowing how to bring into my life what a sensitive part of me has longed for so intensely. All I can perceive are these shattered pieces of hope and a withdrawal of my own will to risk being vulnerable and in relating. Tears still run down, marking the pain of being a prisoner of myself. - During a recent "Building Love that Lasts" Study Group Call, I shared my observation about these two parts inside of me and what they are doing in my relating spaces and that I don't know how to go to the next step. I was introduced by Clinton to the Rejointment Process and have been asked if I wanted to take the commitment of finding a spaceholder for that process. - Yes was the only answer that was aligned with my commitment towards healing and creating intimacy and relating. - I found a spaceholder exactly the right spaceholder, and we arranged a time and date. I was warned to take time and space to integrate the process. The process, in short, is going before the time when I have decided to split parts inside of me because of the pain of the situation and re-member these parts and rejoice the time when they were one. - I felt scared, not knowing what will happen. I mean, we are talking about two parts inside of me that are in conflict with each other but don't know if each other's existence, and depending on which part is running the show creates a completely different experience and relating for myself and my partner. - Gabriela Fagundes helped me to discover and experience these two parts more in all of my 5 bodies. - And it became obvious that the Reihenhaus Dad is exactly what I decided to take on to deal with “the craziness of women”. That “craziness of women” was what I have learned from the men around me. My father, my grandfather, and sadly I have to say all of the men I learned from as a child and later on as a grown-up. - The spiritual adventurer is a very sensitive, present part that suffered a lot from the culture I experienced with the men´s in my family and later on in my life and my juvenile years in street "gang" culture. - I was able to experience the play and strategy that played out between them and the dynamics this brought into myself and relating spaces. - The spiritual adventurer decided that the longing and need could only be fulfilled by the presence of a woman, especially by a strong, dangerous, adventurous and wild woman who is stronger than the culture that caused me pain. - The Reihenhaus Dad saw no other option than the life in this small quad as the men's world he knew is destructive and threatening, and women are “a danger” as “they cause all the trouble” so they needed to be suppressed or sedated to be calm, understanding, caring… all what a strong, dangerous, adventurous and wild woman is not in the first place for that kind of guy or maybe more precisely uninitiated boy. - I rejoiced the essence of being and could sense the inner pull from the other parts, along with the conflict it stirred within me. - We then went to the time before I created these two parts, and I landed in the woumb of my mother at maybe 3 months of development, and at that time, every need was taken care of. Experiencing this and staying there opens up a door to a space I did not know since the time before I was born. - I could experience this place where all needs were fulfilled and stay there, and this is a new reference point now in my life. - A warm liquid flowed from my physical center up to my heart space, accompanied by a radiant transcendent light in my head region. Simultaneously, a gentle bubbling, like a wave of small sadness, pulsed within this small, floating physical body. In that moment, the quest to discover the meaning of this sadness was palpably present. - I took my time to integrate after the process and proceeded at a slow pace. - The changes are subtle and at the same time deep and impactful. Best I can describe it is that I feel whole and free of conflicts, and I have new abilities in relating spaces. I fell more connected to myself and can relate more easily. No more blocking fights going on inside of me. - I feel joy about the simplicity, peacefulness, and ease that I experience since then. - I am exploring this new me and the life it has for me to offer. - When it sounds familiar to you that there are opposing parts inside of you that create conflicts inside of you and in your life, I invite you to get to know these parts more, write about them, give them names, describe their qualities, specialties, motives and so on. And when you want to take one step further and re-member them, find a spaceholder like Gabriela who is a specialist in her craft and in service of healing and go the next step. - Having done that, write about it and explore the new life, and let me know what you experience in your new life. - My edge and experiment right now is to Re-membering this experience and sensation in all of my 5 bodies, the feeling of being one, being complete, while acknowledging the potential to re-member the experience and sensation of being broken, disjointed. - Recognizing the power of choice and allowing my body's wisdom to speak and express itself. - Love, Kristoffer

- Acknowledgement - Disappointment - Treatment - Disjointment... - It is the condition of 'being disjointed'... - like the condition of being acknowledged, disappointed, or treated. - Disjointment is using an internal discontinuity as a Survival Strategy. - Powerful. - Clever. - And very expensive in terms of Adulthood. 
- Detecting The Disjointment Survival Strategy - A few common features of the Disjointment Survival Strategy: - No One Reliable At Home: People have parts—Gremlin parts, Child parts, Parent parts, parts from Mom, parts from Dad, parts for handling the police, parts for only speaking about logistics, Red- / Blue- / Green- / Yellow-brain parts, and on and on. There are also Adult parts. Over the course of initiation, transformation, and practice, the Adult parts in a person strengthen and broaden so that when you say "Hello" to such a person and they say "Hello" back, it is obvious that you are speaking to the Adult. You can build a relational foundation with such a person, can negotiate intimacy, can make agreements. You might even say that there is something "real" here in this Adult part. When a person has a Disjointment Strategy, there is nobody home to say "Hello" to. There might be a disarming, thoughtful, powerful, empathetic, sweet Adult mask—and a convincing one at that!—but this is just part of the show, a façade cobbled together from watching how other people do the Adult thing. Disillusionment about the Adult mask occurs in many ways. One key is that over time, you hear, see, or detect "slips." Slips are actions, comments, or other moves that reveal the inner world and workings happening behind the Adult mask. Often, it ain't pretty. The disparity between the Adult mask and the inner world can be so shockingly great that it is jarring for an outside observer to witness. It might even seem like something is out of joint. That's because it is.
- A Life of Being Betrayed:
- A Trail of Bodies:
- Paranoia: "Who's after me? Who's talking about me? My ears are burning. Someone must be talking about me. I'm on the outside. They're on the inside. Do they notice this? Can I trick them into thinking I'm on the inside? Someone's coming. Ok, just smile and say hello as they pass. (Hello!) Did they notice? They looked at me funny. No, I think I fooled them this time."
- A History of Being "Kicked Out:"
- Built-In-Forgetter: This term comes from a share a woman made during a meeting of Alcoholics Anonymous (AA) many years ago. The share went like this: "I've been coming to AA for 25 years. I keep coming. Why? Because it's called alcohol-IS-m, not alcohol-WAS-m. And, I've got a BUILT-IN-FORGETTER. I remember why I'm sober the moment I step foot in the meeting. But give me 24 hours, and I start forgetting..." The Disjointment Strategy also comes with a built-in-forgetter. A process happens, a person recognizes that their paranoia and teamless-ness are illusions, the crack begins, and then a few hours go by, and BAM... the built-in-forgetter kicks in, and everyone's the enemy again.
 
- Disjointment: Symptoms & Healing Process
- Description Of Disjointment - Fearcraft, the book, is not published yet. It could still take a while for Thoughtware Press to make the book ready. - In the meantime, there are things you can do to prepare yourself for reading the book. - The first thing we think of is: participate in Fear Club. - There are so many astonishing things to experience while exploring the inner territories of Conscious Fear. - And the perfect place to experience these things is in the held and navigated safe space of Fear Club. - Fear Club connects you in with a Team of fellow 'fear explorers', doing Experiments, meeting Challenges, staying at The Edge and finding out what is really going on. This is the Path of becoming Radically Responsible for your Fear. - By finding out what is going on, you simultaneously discover what is Possible. - And, what is Possible that you were not aware of before, could inpire you to live more in accordance with who you are and what you are here to create rather than scratching out some kind of life for the purpose of avoiding fear because you have labeled the experience of fear as 'bad', 'negative', or 'dangerous'. - Fear Club brings you through this popular but swampy maze into new territory, where your Fear empowers your Agency as an Adult by providing you with timely energy impulses and insightful relevant information. Rather than blocking the experience of Fear at all costs, you become Fear, breathe Fear, ride your Fear like a Dragon that you were once afraid of, but empirically discover to be your best friend. - Perhaps by the time you participate in Fear Club once or twice, and become a Fear Club Spaceholder yourself to help others transform their relationship with Fear, the book will be finished! 
- Facing Into Starting Over Someplace Completely Different - RESEARCH NOTES- A few notes on the Disjointment strategy... from Devin Gleeson. - At least two people I used to spend time with who had the Disjointment strategy also had a special relationship with non-human forces or realms. I was often suspicious of their claims about these non-human forces, because they would get messages from these forces at times that were very convenient for the protection of their Survival Strategies. A crude example would be something along these lines: Someone shares confronting feedback with the Disjointment person, and soon after, the Disjointment person gets a message 'from the stars' (or whatever) that the person sharing the feedback is in some way evil. This could happen even with friendships they'd had for years. - I have heard something similar in the way one person talks about ECCO... "ECCO took me away from this ecovillage so that I could go to the next Gaian project..." My detector translates this as something like, "I cannot connect authentically, and when that becomes obvious to the people I'm with, I disappear." - The people I am now referring to as using the Disjointment Survival Strategy I have previously called Borderline. Gosh, I feel sad to think of some of these people, since I have loved them and seen both how trapped they are, and how powerless I am to do anything in the face of their Strategy. - One of the other people I knew was a colleague at a tech company I worked for. Over the course of maybe two years of knowing her, she very slowly revealed different parts of her Underworld to me (eating disorders, self-harm, spite, envy in the sense that Shakespeare called 'green-eyed envy'). What was striking to me was how deeply distinct her Underworld was from the face she showed to the world. My scanning is hopefully more refined now, but at the time, it was shocking to me. - Looking back, I think what also disturbed me is that I could not locate a stable thing in her. There was the Face-I-Show-The-World, there was the Evil-Underworld, there was the part of her that might be smashed to smithereens in hysteria, but there was no one there I could say, "Hello," to, in a manner where that person would clearly say, "Hello," back to me. - I heard the the word 'unreliable' used as a descriptive, and it fits. This is exactly what I am missing in such people, a part that is reliable. - REPORT AFTER A DISJOINTMENT HEALING PROCESS - A REJOINTMENT- "Disjointment or remembering a time before the time" - Can you remember a time and space where all needs are fulfilled? I mean all needs. All needs of all your 5 bodies? - I could not until recently. - Fulfilling my needs. Thinking about fulfilling my needs. Making plans about fulfilling my needs. Meaning most of the time sensing a lack. Sensing something missing. - This was familiar for me, most of my lifetime, most of my adult lifetime doing so with the approach of doing the work to fulfill my needs. - But what are my needs? That which I assumed I needed to be fulfilled. That which I collected in the quest of being fulfilled… - It is endless and exhausting. What "it" am I talking about? What I mean is being on a quest and not getting any further to where I want to be. An ocean of sadness filled by the small sadnesses all along the way of wanting to be nourished, wanting to be nurtured, wanting to be taken care of. - A lifelong longing inside of me to be in connection, be in relating, to simply be and a collection of not getting there, not getting it, not getting any further. - Relating spaces are a beautiful playground or battlefield for the quest to experience this heart need. - This is where I realized it in the most painful, most intense way outside of me, what is already happening inside of me. - Being taught and learned at a young age to observe myself, and by that, I mean observe my emotions, feelings, thoughts, and behavioral patterns and dynamics in my life, I created this neutral observer outside of me who can see clearly, at least most of the time. And writing that, I know this is bullshit and absolutely not true but just a story to create this illusion of having control over what feels sometimes as absolute madness in life. - I noticed over the course of time that I have this part in me that is attracted, drawn to and with admiration for strong, dangerous, adventurous wild women. That part loses itself in the exotic dream world of how life would be and could be with such a woman by my side. I called that part later on the "Spiritual Adventurer." Later, more about that fellow. - And in all relating spaces which I called relationships until very lately, I realized there is an opposing part that feels threatened by such a strong, dangerous, adventurous and wild woman. This part had the tendency to suppress a woman that showed these behaviors. I called that part "Reihenhaus Dad." - If you are not familiar with the German word Reihenhaus, I am sure you get it when I paint you a picture. Have you seen these houses that are built the same, sometimes entire roads or communities with the same shape, same amount of garden, same parkway, sometimes with the same cars parking in front of the houses? A Reihenhaus is exactly that type of building, and a Reihenhaus Dad is exactly a man who you imagine to live in such a habitat. - These two parts are in conflict with each other and draw others into the conflict.
