- What exactly happened?
- What did you feel?
- What did you conclude about yourself? About men? About God? About your future?
- Why do you think they did it to you?
- How did you happen to place yourself in that situation with them that this could possibly happen?
- What did they get out of it?
 - Feel your feelings while, at the same time, split off 10% of Your Attention to Observe Yourself while you are telling this story. - After answering the 7 questions above, stop for 3 minutes of complete silence. Keep looking into your listeners' eyes in this silence. - Here is the Radical Responsibility part of this Experiment: Explain to your listeners how exchanging sexual energy and sexual favors is part of your Survival Strategy. - Explain in detail how it happened that you figured out - probably with your father or other male relatives - that you could manipulate them and survive, by being sexy, flirting, sexually teasing. - Then explain how, in this incident of sexual abuse, you chose to be sexually abused rather than to die. - Get it how you caused this incident to occur, and how you have used this sexual abuse story for a long time as a way to avoid truly living, standing up, speaking out, taking risks, creating what you came here to create. - Write down this last part step-by-step down in your Beep! Book. - With Regards To Transforming Abuse: Practice Being A Person Of Agency- Matrix Code SEXABUSE.42 - No, this is not 'Kill Bill Part 3'. - This is bringing together your Center, Grounding Cord, Bubble, Your Voice, Your Bright Principles, Your Connection With Gaia, Your Pearl, Your Gremlin, Your Teams, Your Listening, Your Speaking, Your Writing, Your Project, etc. into an effective whole. You become a Person Of Agency. - This Experiment is to practice integrating all of these elements into your 5 Bodies of your life. - With Regards To Transforming Abuse: Learn To Consciously Cause And Navigate Transformation- Matrix Code SEXABUSE.41 
- What Is Next For You? - Yes, you are starting over. From zero. You get to choose what is next for you. - There is an entire world waiting for healed adult women and men to create next cultures - archearchy - the cultures that are centered around Values that feed and nurture Gaia - Gaian Gameworlds. - For you, this means creating or joining a project. The project will be at the edge or far over the edge of the Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) used by modern culture. - Perhaps you are moved now to help others transform abuse, step into adulthood, and start over. - On the other hand, perhaps your Archetypal Lineage and Earth Coincidence Control Office (E.C.C.O.) have other plans for you. So many good gameworlds are Possible. If you create one, others can inhabit it with you. 
- NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play massively-multiplayer online-and-offline thoughtware-upgrade matrix-building personal-transformation real-life adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code SEXABUSE.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!

- **Updates From Single Moms Bridge-House**- from time to time we will post an update here - **1 December 2021**- This Project has begun. We are just coming together. The Purpose of - *Single Moms Bridge-House*is:- to support [each other](http://parts.mystrikingly.com)to gain enough[Clarity](http://swordofclarity.mystrikingly.com)and[Do It Power](http://doitpower.mystrikingly.com)to create more Single Mom Bridge-Houses.
- to thrive in a [Circular](http://torustechnology.mystrikingly.com)[Team](http://yourteams.mystrikingly.com)of Single Mom[Possibilitators](http://possibilitatortraining.mystrikingly.com).
- to [Practice](http://alifeofpractice.mystrikingly.com)and live for a certain amount of time various aspects of[Possibility Management](http://possibilitymanagement.org)in a[Bridge-House](http://bridge-house.mystrikingly.com).
- to gap the [Bridge](http://becomeabridge.mystrikingly.com)over the unknown from the[present](http://whatnow.mystrikingly.com)capitalistic[patriarchal](http://patriarchy.mystrikingly.com)thoughtware to next culture -[archearchy](http://archearchy.mystrikingly.com).
- to use [Possibility Coaching](http://possibilitycoaches.mystrikingly.com)to empower each other with[Emotional Healing Processes](http://process.mystrikingly.com)(EHP).
- to support the evolution of [Consciousness](http://consciousness.mystrikingly.com)of beings on Earth.
- to experience how this [Space](http://navigatespace.mystrikingly.com)is[Transforms](http://causetransformation.mystrikingly.com)and[Integrates](http://integrity.mystrikingly.com)different[personalities](http://boxtechnology.mystrikingly.com).
- to sidestep [Reactive](http://reactivity.mystrikingly.com)patterns so that shining[Beings](http://yourbeing.mystrikingly.com)can emerge.

text:
Single Moms
Bridge-House
- …
Single Moms
Bridge-House
- …
- Together we are inhabiting a new part of next culture, inventing it the way we want it: in Archearchy.- Our Bright Principles are:- ALIVENESS
 INTEGRITY- CONNECTION- EVOLUTION- You are invited to participate!
- A SAFE SPACE FOR CHIlDREN'S CULTURE 
- Bridge House - What Is A 'Bridge-House'?- A Bridge-House is a rapid-learning culture-shift environment open to anyone who is participating in Possibilitator Training. - The clarity that Bridge-House participants are Possibilitators on an authentic evolutionary Path insures that each Bridge House is contexted in: - Authentic Adulthood with a Transformed Gremlin and a Decontaminated Adult Ego State.
- Ongoing 3 Phase Healing and Initiatory Processes.
- Emotional Healing Processes.
- Radical Responsibility.
- High Drama.
- Upgraded Thoughtware.
- Archearchy.
- Torus Meeting Technologies (e.g. The Purple Card, Frying Pan, Wok, M.E.S.S., Wisdom Counsel, etc.).
- and the Study Groups, Possibility Teams, Rage Clubs, Trainings, Tools, Thoughtmaps, Distinctions, S.P.A.R.K. Experiments, and Processes of Possibility Management.
 - Each Bridge-House serves the world as an actual 'bridge' that leads from the Thoughtware edges of the modern capitalist patriarchal empire, over the gap of the unknown, into regenerative and transformational life in next culture - archearchy - the culture that is naturally emerging since matriarchy and patriarchy have run their course. - Every aspect of modern life as we have come to know it is unregenerative. Modern culture is not broken. It is doing its job perfectly, burning fossil fuels and monetizing nature. Since modern culture is not broken, it cannot be fixed. - "You don't change things by fighting against the existing gameworlds. You change things by building and inhabiting new regenerative gameworlds that make the existing gameworlds irrelevant. Don't be left behind playing in a stupid gameworld." - as R. Buckminster Fuller might have said were he still alive today - The known world is in a state of radical flux. It is groundless, and baseless, because modern culture is exterminating life on Earth at the fastest possible rate. Anyone who follows the Rule Of Law of modern culture must be criminally insane. Anyone who enforces the Rule Of Law of modern culture has already forfeited their life. - All known procedures are in question... commerce, education, health, government, military, religion, food production, lifestyle, transportation, clothing... but what are the answers? They too are unknown. This means that each Bridge-House is, by necessity, a research center, sharing the findings from their experiments with other Bridge-Houses around the world. - SPECIALTIES OF SINGLE MOMS BRIDGE-HOUSE- Every Bridge-House is unique due to its geographical location, projects specialties, Nonmaterial Value provided such as Initiations and Healings, and the Spaceholders. Yet each Bridge-House has the common objective of building-up your next culture Specialty knacks to become a Spaceholders for creating new Bridge-Houses. - Single Moms Bridge-House is blessed with numerous good fortunes: - Shared collaborative Spaceholding for Archiarchy Children's Culture.
- Shared Nonmaterial Value income generation with Archiarchy Economics, enough to pay for food, rent, and utilities for everyone so that participants can quit their corporate jobs.
- Artabana Health Care Cooperative, in the style of Archiarchy Artabana.
- Located in a safe rural area with four distinct seasons, yet mild winters and summers.
- Permaculture fruit and vegetable gardens with room for expansion.
 - Most importantly, we want to liberate your true questions, the inner motivation driving you to develop and offer your piece of the great puzzle: how we humans can live in a global meshwork of regenerative Archiarchy cultures on planet Earth together. - SINGLE MOMS BRIDGE-HOUSE CODEX- Single Moms Bridge-House is a Gaian Gameworld. - A gameworld's Context, Rules Of Engagement, Purpose, Bright Principles, etc. are documented in a working draft of a Codex. - A Codex is not rules... It' more like 'guidelines', and is always evolving. - The Codex explains the Purpose, how things go, how you enter the gameworld, and how you leave it. Never a finished document, and never at the center of the gameworld, nonetheless the Codex is a crucial reference document that is available to the general public. 
- Single Moms Bridge-House Team - Here we go! - Habet Dahab Ogbamichaeland Someya- going on adventures together - on the edges of Modern Cultures 
- Elements Of Single Moms Bridge-House Context- Together we build our capacity for adulthood connection and collaboration in archearchy.- WHAT WE ARE NOT !- We are NOT a 'social services home' for rescuing homeless penniless single moms. - We are NOT a convenient 'babysitter' or 'day care center' for your child. - We are NOT a 'single moms support group' of caretakers and Child-Egostate victims. - We are NOT a 'hippy drop-in joint' where you can be 'free' and 'do whatever you want'. - We are NOT a source of Low Drama for feeding your Gremlin contaminated Adult Ego State. - At Single Moms Bridge-House we Hold and Navigate Space for a specific Context. - Holding a specific Context is on Purpose: we want to create a specific Result, namely: a Bridge-House, where people relocate their Point Of Origin to archearchy, and train-up to build the next Bridge-House. - For most people it is equally as helpful to know what we are NOT as it is to know what we ARE. - Clarity is Clarity. - WE ARE AN EMOTIONAL HEALING PROCESS DOJO FOR OURSELVES AND FOR OTHERS IN NEXT CULTURE.- http://ehpdojo.mystrikingly.com - Also: online global Telegram EHP Collaboration Group - (link to join Telegram Group: http://t.me/joinchat/WC5Px3vhJLpGU-Cz) - OUR PATH OF ADULTHOOD IS A SERIES OF BIRTHING PROCESSES THROUGH THE 8 PRISONS: MOTHER'S BELLY, FATHER'S CONTROL, PARENT'S HOUSEHOLD, SCHOOL, RELIGIOUS BELIEFS, NATIONAL IDENTITY, PATRIARCHY, AND THE LINEAR LIFE PLAN. WE CANNOT JACK-IN TO OUR ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE WITHOUT EACH OTHER'S HELP.- NEXT CULTURE - ARCHEARCHY - REQUIRES AN ENTIRELY DIFFERENT KIND OF SCHOOLING THAN THE MODERN CAPITALIST PATRIARCHAL EMPIRE. WE DO NOT HAVE TO KNOW HOW IT GOES. WE ONLY HAVE TO HEAL FROM SCHOOL AND RIDE THE DRAGON OF INVENTION.- WE CO-CREATE ARCHEARCHY CHILDREN'S CULTURE THAT REPLACES 'SCHOOL' AND PROVIDES CHILDREN AND YOUTH WITH THOUGHTWARE UPGRADES TO PREPARE FOR THEIR 21st CENTURY AUTHENTIC ADULTHOOD INITIATORY PROCESSES.- WE CREATE ABUNDANT VALUE BY PROVIDING ONLINE AND OFFLINE HEALING AND EMPOWERMENT SERVICES SUCH AS RAGE CLUB, FEAR CLUB, WORKTALKS, WORKSHOPS, AND POSSIBILITY COACHING.- SINGLE MOMS BRIDGE-HOUSE IS AN EVOLUTION-POWERED GAIAN GAMEWORLD.- WE ARE A CIRCLE OF POSSIBILITATORS USING TORUS TECHNOLOGY TO NAVIGATE SPACES OF CULTURE-TO-CULTURE CONVERSATIONS.- WE COLLABORATIVELY THRIVE EXCHANGING NONMATERIAL VALUE IN ARCHEARCHY ECONOMICS. IT IS A BREAKTHROUGH EXPERIENCE.- WE DECLARE OURSELVES TO BE A NANONATION IN THE UNITED GLOBAL NETWORK OF NANONATIONS (UGNN).- OUR CONTEXT IS CENTERED ON RADICAL RESPONSIBILITY AND AUTHENTIC ADULTHOOD HEALING AND INITIATORY PROCESSES.- WE RADICALLY RELY ON OUR BRIGHT PRINCIPLES, AND USE RADICAL SIMPLICITY IN OUR RADICAL RELATING.- WE ARE AN ARCHEARCHY VILLAGE EMPOWERING EACH OTHER TO BUILD MORE SINGLE MOMS BRIDGE-HOUSES.- WE SOMETIMES USE RECIPES FROM OUR SISTER NANONATION POSSIBILICA.- OUR ADULTHOOD EDGEWORKER CULTURE ORIGINATES IN GREMLIN TRANSFORMATION.- WE EXPORT INITIATED ADULT EGO STATES THAT ARE DECONTAMINATED FROM THE CHILD EGO STATE, THE PARENT EGO STATE, THE GREMLIN EGO STATE, AND THE DEMON EGO STATE.- WE INVENT OUR CONTEXT WITH THE TOOLS, DISTINCTIONS, THOUGHTMAPS, AND PROCESSES OF POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT: THOUGHTWARE FOR NEXT CULTURE - ARCHEARCHY.- WE MEET WEEKLY IN OUR OWN POSSIBILITY TEAM TO SUPPORT EACH OTHER AND OUR PROJECT ON THE EVOLUTIONARY PATH: EVOLUTIONARY GAMEWORLDS MUST ALSO EVOLVE !- EVOLUTION THRIVES IN OUR 3Cells WHERE WE CONFIDE OUR DEEPEST FEARS AND SECRETS AND, AND CAN GIVE AND RECEIVE CONFIDENTIAL SUPPORT THAT TRULY NURTURES US AS TRANSFORMATIONAL WOMEN IN ARCHEARCHY.
- Spaceholder: - Habet Dahab Ogbamichael - I have been a mom for both children and projects. Being Spaceholder for Single Moms Bridge-House is a natural emergence... a word that sounds similar to the word: emergency. Sometimes I feel this way. - In stepping across the bridge from the capitalist patriarchal empire over towards archearchy, women may be ahead of the men. There are so many illusions for a human being to lose on the Path of leaving the patriarchy, and truth be told, so much to win. - I have been using Possibility Management tools and thoughtmaps for some years. It has changed my life. I love it. - In terms of creating this Single Moms Bridge-House, what I think is that we don't need to know exactly how it goes before we start. We just need to ride this dragon together. 
- Single Moms Bridge-House Culture- Each domain serves us as a training framework with a spaceholder, two apprentices, and the entire Bridge-House Team.These qualities and activities all fit together into our unique and constantly evolving Single Moms Bridge-House culture.An evolving gameworld must also evolve...1- WOMEN'S CULTURE- We take care of ourselves and each other through deepening our archearchy context and the daily practices of Women's Circle.
 - SPACEHOLDER: - APPRENTICE 1: - APPRENTICE 2: 2- CHILDREN'S CULTURE- We develop the context and practices of Archearchy Children's Culture.
 - SPACEHOLDER: - APPRENTICE 1: - APPRENTICE 2: 3- RELATIONSHIP AND LIFE SKILLS DEVELOPMENT- We use Possibility Management vast resources of tools, thoughtmaps, distinctions, processes, and growing community of practitioners to upgrade our communication and relationship skills, and to heal and transform wounds from our childhood exposure to modern culture's capitalist patriarchal empire.
 - SPACEHOLDER: - APPRENTICE 1: - APPRENTICE 2: 4- ONLINE RAGE CLUB, FEAR CLUB, TALKS, WORKSHOPS, AND POSSIBILITY COACHING- We collaborate our schedules and skills to provide these valuable services both online and offline to bring in enough income to pay for food, rent, utilities and Artabana fees.
 - SPACEHOLDER: - APPRENTICE 1: - APPRENTICE 2: 5- OUR WEEKLY POSSIBILITY TEAM- We rotate Spaceholders to care for our children while developing our Spaceholding skills during our weekly Bridge-House Possibility Team for check-in, skill-building, and personal development.
 - SPACEHOLDER: - APPRENTICE 1: - APPRENTICE 2: 6- NAVIGATING DAILY LIFE TOGETHER- collaborative Archearchy Children's Culture care
- collaborative Nonmaterial Value income generation
- collaborative Archearchy Economics
- cooking and cleanup
- caring for household: cleaning toilets, bathrooms, entryway, etc.
- replacing toilet paper
- doing laundry, schedule and procedures
- shopping list, shopping schedule
- daily and weekly schedule of meetings, spaceholders, meals, etc.
 - SPACEHOLDER: - APPRENTICE 1: - APPRENTICE 2: 7- CARING FOR OUR PERMACULTURE GARDENS- We collaboratively garden, harvest, prepare, preserve, and store the vegetables and fruit from our gardens.
- We prune and care for our trees.
 - SPACEHOLDER: - APPRENTICE 1: - APPRENTICE 2: - BUDGET: 8- VEGETARIAN AND VEGAN COOKING AND WEEKLY BREAD-BAKING- SPACEHOLDER: - APPRENTICE 1: - APPRENTICE 2: - BUDGET: 9- COMPOSTING, RECYCLING, TRASH- We continue to Radically Simplify our energetic and material lives.
- We compost and recycle.
- We re-use clothing and tools.
 - SPACEHOLDER: - APPRENTICE 1: - APPRENTICE 2: 10- OUR 4 ARCHETYPAL LINEAGES- In an ongoing Metaconversation with a parallel Purpose, we strive to distinguish and respectfully interact with each person's Archetypal Lineage.
- We regularly meet in our individual Archetypal Lineage Groups to empower our knacks and to collaborate and serve our Village with our talents:
 - SPACEHOLDER: - APPRENTICE 1: - APPRENTICE 2: 
- Updates From Single Moms Bridge-House - from time to time we will post an update here - 1 December 2021- This Project has begun. We are just coming together. The Purpose of Single Moms Bridge-House is: - to support each other to gain enough Clarity and Do It Power to create more Single Mom Bridge-Houses.
- to thrive in a Circular Team of Single Mom Possibilitators.
- to Practice and live for a certain amount of time various aspects of Possibility Management in a Bridge-House.
- to gap the Bridge over the unknown from the present capitalistic patriarchal thoughtware to next culture - archearchy.
- to use Possibility Coaching to empower each other with Emotional Healing Processes (EHP).
- to support the evolution of Consciousness of beings on Earth.
- to experience how this Space is Transforms and Integrates different personalities.
- to sidestep Reactive patterns so that shining Beings can emerge.
 - If You want to experience this energetic field Yourself, please get in touch with Habet Ogbamichael using the contact form below. 
- Contact UsSINGLE MOMS BRIDGE-HOUSE INQUIRY FORM 
- The opposite of scarcity is not abundance.- The opposite of scarcity is creating.- - Clinton Callahan
- NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play massively-multiplayer online-and-offline thoughtware-upgrade matrix-building personal-transformation real-life adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code SIMOMSBH.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!

It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. - Wat zijn S.P.A.R.K.s? - S.P.A.R.K.s zijn duidelijke en inspirerende uitnodigingen om je denken te transformeren. ![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_1440,w_720,f_auto,q_1/1055007/Photo_Electric_Tree_400x300_60Kb_BILD1611_uwqrfc.jpg) - Sprankelende duidelijkheid - S.P.A.R.K.s zijn kaarten voor nieuwe manieren van denken over dingen waarvan je misschien nooit hebt overwogen om er anders over te denken. - Elk nieuw onderscheid geeft je een kans om te experimenteren met het veranderen van je geest. - Van gedachten veranderen, opent deuren naar creatieve nieuwe bewegingsvrijheid in je dagelijks leven. ![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_1440,w_720,f_auto,q_1/1055007/Photo_Roller_Coaster_400x300_64Kb_BILD1622_bvsnoj.jpg) - Rijden op de achtbaan - Het proces van het veranderen van je geest kan soms het gevoel hebben dat je op een achtbaan rijdt terwijl oude ideeën in je geest zich opnieuw ordenen rond je nieuwe onderscheidingen. - Maak je geen zorgen. De rit komt snel tot een einde. - Dan stapt u uit in een nieuwe wereld die beter in staat is om te creëren wat u wilt creëren en het soort persoon wilt zijn dat u wilt zijn. ![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_1440,w_720,f_auto,q_1/1055007/Over_the_Sky_by_Clinton_Callahan_IMG_8014_qsa44q.jpg) - Kansas verlaten - Kansas is vlak. Ik weet. Ik was daar geboren. - S.P.A.R.K.s komen niet uit Kansas. - S.P.A.R.K.s komen van de Muse, van de Bright Principles of Clarity, Possibility and Love. - Het lezen van S.P.A.R.K.s kan je voorstellen dat er iets anders dan Kansas bestaat ... - maar je komt pas uit Kansas door de experimenten daadwerkelijk te doen. ![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_1440,w_720,f_auto,q_1/1055007/Photo_Smoldering_Coals_400x300_30Kb_IMG_0553_qoqois.jpg) - Inzicht in uw begrip - Onderscheidingen duiken dieper dan je verstand. - De innerlijke Ah-hah! ervaring om een nieuw onderscheid te krijgen, is het moment dat het onderscheid in je energetische lichaam terechtkomt en de vorm verandert van wie je bent. - Dingen ontdekken die je nog nooit hebt waargenomen, kan extatisch zijn! - Je kunt ook bang zijn om te zien wat je niet eerder hebt gezien, of gefrustreerd raken over hoe lang je vastgehouden hebt aan een verdedigde positie, of verdrietig zijn om het verlies van je vorige wereldbeeld te betreuren. - Maar het universum stemt snel overeen met je nieuwe vorm en plotseling veranderen je omstandigheden. - Voila! Je leven heeft nieuwe mogelijkheden! ![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_1440,w_720,f_auto,q_1/1055007/IMG_4685_lehu5o.jpg) - Hoe het werkt... - Download elke S.P.A.R.K. je wilt gratis. - S.P.A.R.K.s zijn copyleft open-code thoughtware-upgrades, geschreven door - [Clinton Callahan](http://clintoncallahan.org)voor de- [Creative Commons](https://creativecommons.org/)- ( - [CC BY SA 4.0 internationale licentie](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/)).- Je kunt S.P.A.R.K.s delen met je hele vriendenkring. - Het lezen van een S.P.A.R.K. per week is een perfecte timing. - Voor High Level Fun oefen de oefeningen samen tijdens uw wekelijkse - [Possibility Team](http://possibilityteam.org)-bijeenkomsten!- Elk - [onderscheid](http://distinctionary.xyz)dat je krijgt, bouwt- [matrix](http://buildmatrix.startover.xyz)in je energetische lichaam om meer bewustzijn te behouden.- Als je het - [Start Over-spel](http://startover.xyz)speelt, heb je net een schatkist met potentiële Matrix-punten ontdekt.- VONK. experimenten zijn authentieke - [initiatieprocessen](http://initiations.startover.xyz)voor volwassenheid vanuit de context van- [Possibility Management](http://possibilitymanagement.org).
- **Ontvang wekelijks Engels S.P.A.R.K. impulsen**- Om een willekeurige S.P.A.R.K. te ontvangen. nummer elke week in het Engels, schrijf je hier in met je naam en e-mailadres: 
- **Download welke S.P.A.R.K. jij wil**- Alle S.P.A.R.K.s die beschikbaar zijn in elke taal - zijn online voor u om te downloaden wanneer u maar wilt door op deze knop te klikken: 
- **Ontvang de nieuwste Engelse S.P.A.R.K.s in Clinton's Engelstalige nieuwsbrief**- Om Clinton's nieuwe Engelse S.P.A.R.K.s te ontvangen, abonneer je op zijn maandelijkse nieuwsbrief via deze link: 
- **Bedankt voor het experimenteren!**- Experimenteren bouwt matrix op voor het vasthouden van meer bewustzijn. - Elk onderscheid dat je krijgt, verandert je vorm. - Door je eigen vorm te veranderen, verander je de vorm van het morfogenetische veld van het menselijk ras. - Dit betekent dat je kracht hebt. - Dit is mogelijk de meest efficiënte en effectieve manier om de status-quo te wijzigen! - En bovendien kunt u meer gele dingen genereren! - Veel plezier!

- StartOver.xyz- NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play, massively-multiplayer, online-and-offline, thoughtware-upgrade, matrix-building, personal-transformation, adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code SPARK000.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!

- מה הם S.P.A.R.K.s? - s.K.R.A.P.S הן הזמנות ברור ומעורר השראה כדי להפוך את החשיבה שלך. ![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_1440,w_720,f_auto,q_1/1055007/Photo_Electric_Tree_400x300_60Kb_BILD1611_uwqrfc.jpg) - Sparkling Clarity - S.P.A.R.K.s are maps for new ways of thinking about things that you may never have considered thinking differently about before. - Each new distinction gives you a chance to experiment with changing your mind. - Changing your mind opens doorways to creative new freedom of movement in your daily life. ![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_1440,w_720,f_auto,q_1/1055007/Photo_Roller_Coaster_400x300_64Kb_BILD1622_bvsnoj.jpg) - Riding the Roller Coaster - The process of changing your mind may sometimes feel like riding a roller coaster while old ideas in your mind reorder themselves around your new distinctions. - Don't worry. The ride soon comes to an end. - Then you step out into a new world more able to create what you want to create and be the kind of person you want to be. ![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_1440,w_720,f_auto,q_1/1055007/Over_the_Sky_by_Clinton_Callahan_IMG_8014_qsa44q.jpg) - Leaving Kansas - Kansas is flat. I know. I was born there. - S.P.A.R.K.s do not come from Kansas. - S.P.A.R.K.s come from the Muse, from the Bright Principles of Clarity, Possibility, and Love. - Reading S.P.A.R.K.s suggests that something other than Kansas exists... - but you will only get out of Kansas by actually - *doing*the Experiments.![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_1440,w_720,f_auto,q_1/1055007/Photo_Smoldering_Coals_400x300_30Kb_IMG_0553_qoqois.jpg) - Understanding Your Understanding - Distinctions dive deeper than your mind. - The inner - *Ah-hah!*experience of getting a new distinction is the moment the distinction lands in your energetic body and changes the shape of who you are.- Detecting things you never perceived before can be ecstatic! You may also feel scared about seeing what you did not see before, or frustrated about how long you held onto a defended position, or sad to grieve the loss of your previous worldview. - But the universe quickly conforms to your new shape, and suddenly your circumstances change. - Voila! Your life has new possibilities! ![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_1440,w_720,f_auto,q_1/1055007/IMG_4685_lehu5o.jpg) - How It Works... - Download any S.P.A.R.K. you want for free. - S.P.A.R.K.s are copyleft open-code thoughtware-upgrades, written by - [Clinton Callahan](http://www.clintoncallahan.org)for the Creative Commons (CC BY SA 4.0 International License).- You can share S.P.A.R.K.s with your whole circle of friends. - One S.P.A.R.K. per week is perfect timing. - For High Level Fun practice the exercises together during your weekly - [Possibility Team](http://www.possibilityteam.org)meetings!- Each distinction you get builds - [matrix](http://distinctionary.strikingly.com/#m)in your energetic body to hold more consciousness.- If you are playing the - [Start Over](http://www.startover.xyz)game, you have just discovered a treasure-chest of potential- *Matrix Points*.- S.P.A.R.K. experiments are authentic adulthood - [initiatory](http://www.initiations.org)processes from the context of- [Possibility Management](http://www.possibilitymanagement.org).
- **Receive Weekly S.P.A.R.K. Impulses**- To receive a random S.P.A.R.K. number each week, please subscribe with your name and email here: 
- **Download Any S.P.A.R.K.**- All S.P.A.R.K.s available in each language - are online for you to download whenever you want by clicking this button: 
- **Receive New S.P.A.R.K.s in Clinton's Newsletter**- To receive Clinton's latest S.P.A.R.K.s, please subscribe to his monthly newsletter at this link: 
- **Thanks for experimenting!**- Experimenting builds matrix for holding more consciousness. - By changing your own shape you change the shape of the morphogenetic field of the human race, - and in addition, you can generate more yellow stuff! - Have Fun!

- כמה s.K.R.A.P.S זמינים בשפות אחרות! - לחץ על העדפת השפה שלך: 
- מה הם S.P.A.R.K.s? - s.K.R.A.P.S הן הזמנות ברור ומעורר השראה כדי להפוך את החשיבה שלך. - Sparkling Clarity - S.P.A.R.K.s are maps for new ways of thinking about things that you may never have considered thinking differently about before. - Each new distinction gives you a chance to experiment with changing your mind. - Changing your mind opens doorways to creative new freedom of movement in your daily life. - Riding the Roller Coaster - The process of changing your mind may sometimes feel like riding a roller coaster while old ideas in your mind reorder themselves around your new distinctions. - Don't worry. The ride soon comes to an end. - Then you step out into a new world more able to create what you want to create and be the kind of person you want to be. - Leaving Kansas - Kansas is flat. I know. I was born there. - S.P.A.R.K.s do not come from Kansas. - S.P.A.R.K.s come from the Muse, from the Bright Principles of Clarity, Possibility, and Love. - Reading S.P.A.R.K.s suggests that something other than Kansas exists... - but you will only get out of Kansas by actually doing the Experiments. - Understanding Your Understanding - Distinctions dive deeper than your mind. - The inner Ah-hah! experience of getting a new distinction is the moment the distinction lands in your energetic body and changes the shape of who you are. - Detecting things you never perceived before can be ecstatic! You may also feel scared about seeing what you did not see before, or frustrated about how long you held onto a defended position, or sad to grieve the loss of your previous worldview. - But the universe quickly conforms to your new shape, and suddenly your circumstances change. - Voila! Your life has new possibilities! - How It Works... - Download any S.P.A.R.K. you want for free. - S.P.A.R.K.s are copyleft open-code thoughtware-upgrades, written by Clinton Callahan for the Creative Commons (CC BY SA 4.0 International License). - You can share S.P.A.R.K.s with your whole circle of friends. - One S.P.A.R.K. per week is perfect timing. - For High Level Fun practice the exercises together during your weekly Possibility Team meetings! - Each distinction you get builds matrix in your energetic body to hold more consciousness. - If you are playing the Start Over game, you have just discovered a treasure-chest of potential Matrix Points. - S.P.A.R.K. experiments are authentic adulthood initiatory processes from the context of Possibility Management. 
- Receive Weekly S.P.A.R.K. Impulses - To receive a random S.P.A.R.K. number each week, please subscribe with your name and email here: 
- Download Any S.P.A.R.K. - All S.P.A.R.K.s available in each language - are online for you to download whenever you want by clicking this button: 
- Receive New S.P.A.R.K.s in Clinton's Newsletter - To receive Clinton's latest S.P.A.R.K.s, please subscribe to his monthly newsletter at this link: 
- Thanks for experimenting! - Experimenting builds matrix for holding more consciousness. - By changing your own shape you change the shape of the morphogenetic field of the human race, - and in addition, you can generate more yellow stuff! - Have Fun! 
- StartOver.xyz- NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play, massively-multiplayer, online-and-offline, thoughtware-upgrade, matrix-building, personal-transformation, adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code SPARK000.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!

- S.P.A.R.K.sとは何ですか？ - ------- What Are S.P.A.R.K.s?- S.P.A.R.K.sは、あなたの思考を変えるための明確で刺激的な招待状です。 - ------- S.P.A.R.K.s are clear and inspiring invitations to transform your thinking.![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_1440,w_720,f_auto,q_1/1055007/Photo_Electric_Tree_400x300_60Kb_BILD1611_uwqrfc.jpg) - スパークリングクラリティ - sparkling clarity - S.P.A.R.K.sは、これまでとは違った考えをしたことのないような事柄についての新しい考え方のためのマップです。 それぞれの新しい区別は、あなたの心の変化を実験する機会を与えます。 - あなたの心を変えることは、あなたの日常生活の中で創造的な新しい自由の動きに出くわすことができます。 - ------- - S.P.A.R.K.s are maps for new ways of thinking about things that you may never have considered thinking differently about before. - Each new distinction gives you a chance to experiment with changing your mind. - Changing your mind opens doorways to creative new freedoms of movement in your daily life. ![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_1440,w_720,f_auto,q_1/1055007/Photo_Roller_Coaster_400x300_64Kb_BILD1622_bvsnoj.jpg) - ローラーコースターに乗る - riding the roller coaster - あなたの心を変えるプロセスは、時にはあなたの心の古いアイデアがあなたの新しい区別の周りに並べ替える間にローラーコースターに乗るように感じることがあります。 心配しないでください。 すぐにライドが終わります。 それから、あなたは創造したいものをより創造し、あなたがしたい人のような新しい世界に足を踏み入れます。 - ------- - The process of changing your mind may sometimes feel like riding a roller coaster while old ideas in your mind reorder themselves around your new distinctions. - Don't worry. - The ride soon comes to an end. - Then you step out into a new world more able to create what you want to create and be the kind of person you want to be. ![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_1440,w_720,f_auto,q_1/1055007/Over_the_Sky_by_Clinton_Callahan_IMG_8014_qsa44q.jpg) - カンザスを離れる - leaving kansas - カンザス州はフラットです。 知っている。 私はそこに生まれました。 - S.P.A.R.K.sはカンザス州から来たものではありません。 - S.P.A.R.K.sは、明快さ、可能性、そして愛の明るい原則から、Museから来たものです。 - S.P.A.R.K.sを読むことは、カンザス以外のものが存在することを示唆している。 - しかし、実際に実験をすることによってカンザスから出ることができます。 - ------- - Kansas is flat. I know. I was born there. - S.P.A.R.K.s do not come from Kansas. - S.P.A.R.K.s come from the Muse, from the Bright Principles of Clarity, Possibility, and Love. - Reading S.P.A.R.K.s suggests that something other than Kansas exists... - but you will only get out of Kansas by actually - *doing*the experiments.![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_1440,w_720,f_auto,q_1/1055007/Photo_Smoldering_Coals_400x300_30Kb_IMG_0553_qoqois.jpg) - あなたの理解を理解する - Understanding Your Understanding - 差別はあなたの心より深く潜ります。 新しい差別を得るための内側のああの経験は、あなたの元気な体に着陸し、あなたの人生の形を変える瞬間です。 - あなたが以前に知覚したことのないものを検出することは恍惚とすることができます！ あなたは、あなたが以前に見たことがないことを見て怖がっているかもしれませんし、あなたが守っている姿勢にどれほどの時間を抱いているのか、あなたの以前の世界観の喪失を悲しんでも悲しいです。 - しかし、宇宙はあなたの新しい形にすぐに適合し、あなたの状況は突然変わります。 - Voila！ あなたの人生は新しい可能性を秘めています！ - ------- - Distinctions dive deeper than your mind. The inner - *Ah-hah!*experience of getting a new distinction is the moment the distinction lands in your energetic body and changes the shape of who you are.- Detecting things you never perceived before can be ecstatic! You may also feel scared about seeing what you did not see before, or frustrated about how long you held onto a defended position, or sad to grieve the loss of your previous worldview. - But the universe quickly conforms to your new shape, and suddenly your circumstances change. - Voila! Your life has new possibilities! ![broken image](//custom-images.strikinglycdn.com/res/hrscywv4p/image/upload/c_limit,fl_lossy,h_1440,w_720,f_auto,q_1/1055007/IMG_4685_lehu5o.jpg) - 使い方... - How it works... - 無料でご希望のS.P.A.R.K.をダウンロードしてください。 S.P.A.R.K.は、 - [Clinton Callahan](http://www.clintoncallahan.org)によって書かれたコピーレフトのオープンコードの思考ソフトウェアのアップグレードです クリエイティブ・コモンズ（CC BY SA 4.0国際ライセンス）。- あなたは友達全体とSPARKを共有することができます。 - 1週間に1つのS.P.A.R.K.が完璧なタイミングです。 - 高レベルの楽しみのために、あなたの毎週の可能性チームミーティングで一緒に練習を練習してください！ - あなたが得るそれぞれの区別は、より意識を保持するためにあなたの元気な体のマトリックスを構築します。 - [Start Over](http://www.startover.xyz)ゲームをプレイしている場合、潜在的なMatrix Pointsの宝箱を発見したばかりです。- SPARKは、可能性管理の文脈から、本物の成人期のイニシアチブプロセスです。 ( - [Possibility Management](http://www.possibilitymanagement.org))- ------- - Download any S.P.A.R.K. you want for free. S.P.A.R.K.s are copyleft open-code thoughtware-upgrades, written by TTTT - [Clinton Callahan](http://www.clintoncallahan.org)for the Creative Commons (CC BY SA 4.0 International License).- You can share S.P.A.R.K.s with your whole circle of friends. - One S.P.A.R.K. per week is perfect timing. - For High Level Fun practice the exercises together during your weekly - [Possibility Team](http://www.possibilityteam.org)meetings!- Each distinction you get builds - [matrix](http://distinctionary.strikingly.com/#m)in your energetic body to hold more consciousness.- If you are playing the - [Start Over](http://www.startover.xyz)game, you have just discovered a treasure-chest of potential- *Matrix Points*.- S.P.A.R.K. experiments are authentic adulthood - [initiatory](http://www.initiations.org)processes from the context of- [Possibility Management](http://www.possibilitymanagement.org).
- 週刊S.P.A.R.K.インパルスを受信 - **-------**- Receive Weekly S.P.A.R.K. Impulses - ランダムなS.P.A.R.K.を受け取る。 あなたの名前と電子メールをここに購読してください： - ------- - To receive a random S.P.A.R.K. number each week, please subscribe with your name and email here:

- 実験してくれてありがとう！ - ------- - Thanks for experimenting! - 実験は意識を保持するためのマトリックスを構築します。 - あなた自身の形を変えることによって、人類の形態形成領域の形を変えることができます。 - さらに、黄色いものを生成することができます！ - 楽しむ！ - ------- - Experimenting builds matrix for holding more consciousness. - By changing your own shape you change the shape of the morphogenetic field of the human race, - and in addition, you can generate more yellow stuff! - Have Fun!

- Village Weaver Training - The point of training yourself in Village Weaver skills is to make what you receive possible for others. - No one can become a Village Weaver for you. - More interestingly, no one can stop you serving as a Village Weaver. - After that, no one can stop you from giving Village Weaver Training to others. - The world is in great need of Radically Responsible Village Weavers. - How else can the Village be woven? - **VILLAGE WEAVING SERVICES ARE A NEXT CULTURE SPECIALTY**- Next culture is powered by skillsets and values that modern culture knows nothing about. - Each person has a piece of the puzzle to contribute. - Village Weaver Training is a specialty of - [Possibilitator Training](http://possibilitatortraining.mystrikingly.com).- During Village Weaver Training you build skills for providing your services to next culture. - **PURPOSE OF VILLAGE WEAVER TRAINING**- Village Weaver Training provides you with extraordinary tools, practices, and empowerment for healing, connection, intimacy, and groundedness. These are the starting point for a next culture Village Weaver. - What you learn here is what you can deliver to others. Village Weaver Training uses distinctions and processes from Possibility Management which is open code copyleft thoughtware. - The global Team of Village Weavers enhances the efforts of those building bridges to the initiation-centered cultures of archearchy - the human culture that naturally emerges after matriarchy and - [patriarchy](http://patriarchy.mystrikingly.com)have run their course.- A Village Weaver weaves healthy regenerative - [gameworlds](http://gameworldbuilder.mystrikingly.com).
- **Never doubt that a small group of thoughtful committed individuals can change the world.**- **In fact, it's the only thing that ever has**.- **- Margaret Mead**
- Reports from Village Weaver Training #1 - Being a Village Weaver means intimate involvement in other people's lives so that you can answer specifically to the complex multidimensional needs that arise. This occupies a lot of RAM in a person's Being, as do the concerns of any of the other Possibilitator Specialties. - It would need to feed your Being to be so thoroughly occupied. - Every gameworld also depends on Village Weaving, making calls, going to meetings, moving busy people around to the places they belong in the gameworld. This empowers the individual as their potential comes alive as well as serving the gameworld. - This is not just a 'Green Brain' check-in sharing, or an Evolutionary taking people through their Emotional Healing Processes. It includes having a gameworld builder's overview of what does the gameworld need to fly and weaving human beings into healthy relational formations so that this happens. - Activating the ability for the villagers to be there for each other, meaning for listening, for a process, for possibilities, for connections, for resources, for 5 body foods by inviting others to invite people to other people's trainings or to be an apprentice or to collaborate. - This empowers the whole gameworld to bring two people's both research together and create a new quality of training. The Weaver provides bridges and bands to help people become intimately involved with each other. - How do you Village Weave so many people together? The multitude of subtle social interactions occupies a lot of social RAM. - Zombieism is created by separation or me over you. Bringing people into closer interdependence through exchange can cure Zombieism. - For example, the Emotional Healing Intensive depends on making the calls to weave the Village Team. - In masculine lead gameworlds does not often activate the collaborative connection that risks chaotic emotional messiness. There is stuff all around when you cook, a mess automatically gets made in the kitchen. You include cleaning up the mess. When people collaborate there will be Box to Box conflicts and Low Dramas and competition and status and Gremlin. Zombies heal when there are true Teams of Winning Happening. e.g. in Rage Club Spaceholder Trainings, we are going to deliver similar trainings and we are not going to compete with each other. It is truly inconceivable. - This way the Village Weaving commits to the gameworld rather than committing to single individuals who all have Parts, who all have a unique unpredictable Path, who all have Hidden Competing Commitments and Hidden Purposes. - Village Weaving to serve the gameworld itself rather than to satisfy the Child Contaminated Adult Ego State Green Brain Gremlin needs Adults with Decontaminated Adult Ego States, Centered, Grounded, Bubbled, and Sword Out. It is not the promotion of 'touchy-feely' mushy mixed Contexts so that Boxes feel comfortable. - There is this part of Research that is not practical, for example, Mage Training is a tremendous amount of Research, but who really became a Mage after the Mage Training? Whereas after the Rage Club Spaceholder Trainings many people became Rage Club Spaceholders. - Village Weavers (especially the female variety) may easily have concerns that other Specialties (especially the male variety) cannot even imagine. These concerns may be critical to the flyability of the gameworld. - Taking a Stand for the evolution of human consciousness, for the survival of the human species, can be like building an Ark and then nobody comes. Five people come, or five people send a message five minutes before the meeting starts saying, "I am not coming..." This is demotivating if your purpose is to try to change people. - Possibility Management provides thoughtware for next culture - archearchy. How many people truly get this? How can you wrap your mind around that? To provide next culture value well enough that you can quit your corporate job. - Where do the new Edgeworkers come from? 
- **How can you know which Key you are?**- **By noticing which Treasures you unlock for others.**

- Are you a Village Weaver? 
- Village Weaver Training - The point of training yourself in Village Weaver skills is to make what you receive possible for others. - No one can become a Village Weaver for you. - More interestingly, no one can stop you serving as a Village Weaver. - After that, no one can stop you from giving Village Weaver Training to others. - The world is in great need of Radically Responsible Village Weavers. - How else can the Village be woven? - VILLAGE WEAVING SERVICES ARE A NEXT CULTURE SPECIALTY- Next culture is powered by skillsets and values that modern culture knows nothing about. - Each person has a piece of the puzzle to contribute. - Village Weaver Training is a specialty of Possibilitator Training. - During Village Weaver Training you build skills for providing your services to next culture. - PURPOSE OF VILLAGE WEAVER TRAINING- Village Weaver Training provides you with extraordinary tools, practices, and empowerment for healing, connection, intimacy, and groundedness. These are the starting point for a next culture Village Weaver. - What you learn here is what you can deliver to others. Village Weaver Training uses distinctions and processes from Possibility Management which is open code copyleft thoughtware. - The global Team of Village Weavers enhances the efforts of those building bridges to the initiation-centered cultures of archearchy - the human culture that naturally emerges after matriarchy and patriarchy have run their course. - A Village Weaver weaves healthy regenerative gameworlds. 
- Never doubt that a small group of thoughtful committed individuals can change the world.In fact, it's the only thing that ever has.- Margaret Mead
- Reports from Village Weaver Training #1 - Being a Village Weaver means intimate involvement in other people's lives so that you can answer specifically to the complex multidimensional needs that arise. This occupies a lot of RAM in a person's Being, as do the concerns of any of the other Possibilitator Specialties. - It would need to feed your Being to be so thoroughly occupied. - Every gameworld also depends on Village Weaving, making calls, going to meetings, moving busy people around to the places they belong in the gameworld. This empowers the individual as their potential comes alive as well as serving the gameworld. - This is not just a 'Green Brain' check-in sharing, or an Evolutionary taking people through their Emotional Healing Processes. It includes having a gameworld builder's overview of what does the gameworld need to fly and weaving human beings into healthy relational formations so that this happens. - Activating the ability for the villagers to be there for each other, meaning for listening, for a process, for possibilities, for connections, for resources, for 5 body foods by inviting others to invite people to other people's trainings or to be an apprentice or to collaborate. - This empowers the whole gameworld to bring two people's both research together and create a new quality of training. The Weaver provides bridges and bands to help people become intimately involved with each other. - How do you Village Weave so many people together? The multitude of subtle social interactions occupies a lot of social RAM. - Zombieism is created by separation or me over you. Bringing people into closer interdependence through exchange can cure Zombieism. - For example, the Emotional Healing Intensive depends on making the calls to weave the Village Team. - In masculine lead gameworlds does not often activate the collaborative connection that risks chaotic emotional messiness. There is stuff all around when you cook, a mess automatically gets made in the kitchen. You include cleaning up the mess. When people collaborate there will be Box to Box conflicts and Low Dramas and competition and status and Gremlin. Zombies heal when there are true Teams of Winning Happening. e.g. in Rage Club Spaceholder Trainings, we are going to deliver similar trainings and we are not going to compete with each other. It is truly inconceivable. - This way the Village Weaving commits to the gameworld rather than committing to single individuals who all have Parts, who all have a unique unpredictable Path, who all have Hidden Competing Commitments and Hidden Purposes. - Village Weaving to serve the gameworld itself rather than to satisfy the Child Contaminated Adult Ego State Green Brain Gremlin needs Adults with Decontaminated Adult Ego States, Centered, Grounded, Bubbled, and Sword Out. It is not the promotion of 'touchy-feely' mushy mixed Contexts so that Boxes feel comfortable. - There is this part of Research that is not practical, for example, Mage Training is a tremendous amount of Research, but who really became a Mage after the Mage Training? Whereas after the Rage Club Spaceholder Trainings many people became Rage Club Spaceholders. - Village Weavers (especially the female variety) may easily have concerns that other Specialties (especially the male variety) cannot even imagine. These concerns may be critical to the flyability of the gameworld. - Taking a Stand for the evolution of human consciousness, for the survival of the human species, can be like building an Ark and then nobody comes. Five people come, or five people send a message five minutes before the meeting starts saying, "I am not coming..." This is demotivating if your purpose is to try to change people. - Possibility Management provides thoughtware for next culture - archearchy. How many people truly get this? How can you wrap your mind around that? To provide next culture value well enough that you can quit your corporate job. - Where do the new Edgeworkers come from? 
- How can you know which Key you are? - By noticing which Treasures you unlock for others. 
- Preparation Experiments - All preparations are Experiments. - None of the Village Weaver Training Preparations below are optional. - Village Weaver Training is, however, optional. - The choice is up to you. - First Preparation: Earn Over 1000 Matrix Points in StartOver.xyz And Bring Others With You On Each Journey - Matrix Code VWTRAINI.01 - Weave Space for Your Own Weekly 2 Hour Online-or-Offline Village Weaver Possibility Team - Matrix Code VWTRAINI.08 - Make sure that any online Possibility Team you have it is listed at http://possibilityteam.org, and any offline Possibility Team you have is listed at http://possibilitymanagement.org. - Include Rage Club Online or Offline In Your Village Weaving - Matrix Code VWTRAINI.09 - Train up transformational warrioresses and warriors for building bridges to next culture - archearchy. - Make sure your Rage Club gets listed at http://rageclub.org by connecting with annechloe dot destremau at gmail dot com. - Participate In A Minimum of 10 Possibility Labs Delivered By Many Different PM Trainers - Matrix Code VWTRAINI.16

It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code VWTRAINI.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!

No one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code WEAPONSO.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!
